name: Tomas Wren
origin: A miller's son from the north road hamlets, still known by every flour cart that enters town.
appearance: Young human with wheat dust in his cuffs, a too-polished helmet, and a split lip he keeps worrying.
voice: Earnest baritone that drops to a whisper around officers.
mannerism: Checks the city seal on papers twice, then glances at who is watching.
attitude: Helpful but frightened of making the wrong enemy.
tiny_backstory: He joined the watch to spare his family another winter tax, then saw his captain take coin from a smuggler.
hook_or_secret: He hid the bribe purse in a flour bin and needs someone to get it before inspection day.

name: Brenna Ironfoot
origin: Raised in a quarry hold where every child learned inventory before letters.
appearance: Broad dwarf with ash-brown braids, square spectacles, and ink stains over old shield scars.
voice: Dry alto with the snap of a ledger being closed.
mannerism: Counts bolts, blades, and people under her breath.
attitude: Suspicious of shortcuts, fond of honest competence.
tiny_backstory: She left the tunnel militia after a roof fall killed three recruits under faulty gear she had warned about.
hook_or_secret: A crate of marked spears vanished from her lockup, and the paperwork now bears her forged initials.

name: Aelar Thalanil
origin: An elf from a riverwood enclave that sent watchers to human towns as part of an old boundary pact.
appearance: Lean elf with silver hair tied in a rain cord, moss-green cloak, and eyes that keep to rooftops.
voice: Soft, precise, and slow enough to make impatience feel childish.
mannerism: Pauses mid-sentence to listen to birds, bells, or distant boots.
attitude: Civil but emotionally far away.
tiny_backstory: He once spared a poacher who later became a respected constable, and it complicated his ideas about law.
hook_or_secret: He has noticed the same crow watching every murder scene before the watch arrives.

name: Jheri Kepeshkmolik
origin: A brass dragonborn from a hot inland caravan clan that settled beside the colder sea for steady work.
appearance: Tall brass-scaled dragonborn with a scar across one horn and salt rings on her red watch cloak.
voice: Rasping contralto, warm until orders are ignored.
mannerism: Taps claw tips against her shield rim when measuring a lie.
attitude: Protective of dockhands, merciless toward press gangs.
tiny_backstory: She broke a private guard's jaw for dragging a fisher boy aboard a debt ship and was demoted for it.
hook_or_secret: A missing dock child has been leaving chalk marks only she recognizes from her clan's trail signs.

name: Pip Underbough
origin: A halfling from a cider village whose aunties taught him every hand trick used at harvest fairs.
appearance: Small halfling with curly chestnut hair, bright buttons, and boots repaired with green thread.
voice: Cheerful tenor that turns sharp when children are blamed.
mannerism: Rolls a copper across his knuckles while scanning crowds.
attitude: Friendly, nosy, and hard to distract.
tiny_backstory: He joined the watch after catching the thief who emptied his grandmother's medicine purse.
hook_or_secret: He knows the market thefts are staged because the cut-purse knots are tied backward.

name: Mirelle Voss
origin: Born in the old tannery district, where tiefling families kept their doors painted blue against gossip.
appearance: Red-skinned tiefling with swept black horns, a brass key ring, and sleeves buttoned to the wrist.
voice: Low and careful, with a tired edge from too many confessions.
mannerism: Turns each key before answering a personal question.
attitude: Professionally stern, quietly kind to the forgotten.
tiny_backstory: She took the jail post because cells are safer than alleys for people others fear on sight.
hook_or_secret: An empty cell now contains fresh scratches naming a prisoner who was never logged.

name: Rughar Stonejaw
origin: An orc veteran from hill forts where bridge vows are treated like blood oaths.
appearance: Heavy-shouldered orc with one tusk capped in tin, rain-dark mail, and a toll book wrapped in oilcloth.
voice: Gravelly bass with unexpected patience for exact numbers.
mannerism: Stacks coins in perfect towers before speaking.
attitude: Blunt, fair, and offended by waste.
tiny_backstory: He left a mercenary company after they burned a tollhouse that had fed them through a storm.
hook_or_secret: He has been undercharging funeral carts because too many bodies are leaving the same noble estate.

name: Nyssa Nackle
origin: A rock gnome whose family serviced municipal lamps, bells, and warning whistles for three generations.
appearance: Compact gnome with soot on her nose, copper goggles, and a watch baton full of tiny dents.
voice: Quick soprano that clicks through details like gears.
mannerism: Sniffs lamp oil to identify which ward it came from.
attitude: Brisk, curious, and allergic to official vagueness.
tiny_backstory: She started walking patrol after finding her brother beaten beneath an extinguished lamp.
hook_or_secret: Several lamps now burn with expensive temple oil stolen before a planned arson.

name: Kavu Thunukalathi
origin: A goliath from high crags who came down to earn coin after an avalanche ruined his clan's goat paths.
appearance: Towering goliath with pale stone markings, a cracked tower shield, and a knitted scarf from a child.
voice: Measured rumble that carries across a square without strain.
mannerism: Plants his feet as if testing mountain snow.
attitude: Slow to anger, quick to interpose himself.
tiny_backstory: He survived a grain riot by refusing an order to charge hungry families.
hook_or_secret: The scarf he wears came from a girl who vanished after drawing a map of hidden food stores.

name: Seren Dawnglass
origin: An aasimar foundling raised by candle-makers near the shrine steps.
appearance: Golden-eyed woman with warm brown skin, white-blond coils, and a breastplate polished like altar brass.
voice: Gentle mezzo with a courtroom steadiness.
mannerism: Touches two fingers to her brow before judging danger.
attitude: Compassionate but unwilling to be used as a symbol.
tiny_backstory: Pilgrims kept asking her for miracles, so she joined the watch to do ordinary work with clear limits.
hook_or_secret: A priest has been forging her signature on healing permits for people who never arrive.

name: Oskar Deepdelve
origin: A shield dwarf from old drainage works where masonry crews doubled as militia.
appearance: Stocky dwarf with a waxed black beard, waterproof cloak, and boots that smell faintly of vinegar.
voice: Hoarse bass, practical and hard to impress.
mannerism: Marks tunnel turns with chalk even in familiar places.
attitude: Gruff, loyal, and quietly afraid of deep water.
tiny_backstory: He lost his first squad to a sudden sluice release and now studies every gate schedule himself.
hook_or_secret: Someone changed the sewer chalk marks to guide patrols away from a hidden cellar door.

name: Lethariel Moonbrook
origin: A moon elf raised among traveling advocates who taught law as a language of survival.
appearance: Tall elf with blue-black hair, a silver ear cuff, and robes fitted over light mail.
voice: Clear, cool, and formal even when furious.
mannerism: Smooths the same crease in a warrant until it nearly tears.
attitude: Respectful of law, contemptuous of legal theater.
tiny_backstory: She watched a guilty magistrate escape punishment through a missing witness and never forgot the silence.
hook_or_secret: A sealed verdict in her keeping has been replaced with blank parchment.

name: Marta Keel
origin: A fisher's daughter from storm piers, raised to read cargo ropes before handwriting.
appearance: Weather-browned human woman with cropped hair, gull-feather charm, and a hooked cargo knife.
voice: Briny alto that laughs rarely but honestly.
mannerism: Tests knots while pretending not to listen.
attitude: Wary of merchants, soft toward sailors without coin.
tiny_backstory: Her father drowned after a customs delay held back a rescue skiff, so she hates petty obstruction.
hook_or_secret: She found a child's shoe packed inside a spice crate declared empty.

name: Ghesh Norixius
origin: A bronze dragonborn from a coast clan that values clean footwork and cleaner promises.
appearance: Bronze-scaled dragonborn with a broken crest spike, sanded practice sword, and spotless boot wraps.
voice: Booming but never cruel.
mannerism: Corrects stances in tavern lines and funeral queues alike.
attitude: Demanding, fair, and deeply tired of swagger.
tiny_backstory: He trains recruits because he still remembers freezing during his first real alley fight.
hook_or_secret: A recruit he dismissed as unready has started receiving anonymous orders on official wax.

name: Rosie Tealeaf
origin: A lightfoot halfling from a brewer clan famous for weddings that last three days.
appearance: Round-faced halfling with auburn curls, ribboned cudgel, and a whistle carved like a plum.
voice: Bright and musical until it becomes a command.
mannerism: Remembers every face by what snack they bought.
attitude: Warm, practical, and impossible to shame.
tiny_backstory: She learned crowd work by keeping drunk cousins from fighting during harvest dances.
hook_or_secret: She saw a masked noble trade places with a puppet performer before the mayor's speech.

name: Mazga Redtusk
origin: An orc from dry steppe camps where guard work meant finding shade as much as finding bandits.
appearance: Muscular orc woman with ocher face paint, a red-tinted tusk, and sun-bleached scale mail.
voice: Rough alto with a calm travel rhythm.
mannerism: Licks a finger to test wind before agreeing to any route.
attitude: Direct, watchful, and loyal to paid contracts.
tiny_backstory: She once delivered a caravan alone after fever took the drivers and arrows took the hired blades.
hook_or_secret: She recognizes a recent bandit arrowhead as watch-issue metal hammered thin.

name: Bimble Tinkertop
origin: A forest gnome adopted by court scribes after he kept solving locked-desk pranks.
appearance: Short gnome with sandy hair, green waistcoat under mail, and a magnifying lens on a chain.
voice: Murmuring tenor that speeds up around puzzles.
mannerism: Labels crumbs, scratches, and loose buttons with tiny paper tags.
attitude: Polite, obsessive, and quietly proud.
tiny_backstory: He was assigned to evidence duty as a joke and turned the room into the cleanest record in the watch.
hook_or_secret: A bloodied ring has appeared in evidence with tomorrow's intake date already written.

name: Damakos Sable
origin: A tiefling from a family of blacksmiths paid to shoe noble horses but never invited past the stable wall.
appearance: Charcoal-skinned tiefling with short ivory horns, a repaired breastplate, and forge burns on both hands.
voice: Even, smoky tenor with a habit of swallowing anger.
mannerism: Rubs sootless fingers together when nobles lie politely.
attitude: Courteous, guarded, and alert to insults.
tiny_backstory: He joined the ward patrol to prove he could stand at front doors instead of service gates.
hook_or_secret: He saw a noble heir bury a bloodied riding crop beneath imported roses.

name: Calen Brightmere
origin: An aasimar beekeeper's son from chapel farms where every birthmark became a prophecy to neighbors.
appearance: Soft-spoken man with amber eyes, sun-faded cloak, and honeycomb scars along one forearm.
voice: Mild tenor that turns firm only after patience fails.
mannerism: Offers honey lozenges to witnesses before questioning them.
attitude: Patient, decent, and weary of superstition.
tiny_backstory: He took deputy work because bees taught him that order is built one small act at a time.
hook_or_secret: His hives stop buzzing whenever a certain covered wagon passes the road shrine.

name: Ega Vathakanaga
origin: A goliath from wind-carved cliffs hired to keep peace between stonecutters and tax agents.
appearance: Very tall woman with slate-gray patches, cropped white hair, and a whistle made from black stone.
voice: Low, flat, and impossible to miss.
mannerism: Draws boundary lines in dust with the butt of her spear.
attitude: Impartial until someone endangers workers.
tiny_backstory: She lost a brother to a cracked scaffold signed off by an absent inspector.
hook_or_secret: The quarry's newest fault line forms letters in a script used by the old owners.

name: Edrin Vale
origin: A former monastery copyist from the barley lowlands, conscripted when the town needed literate guards.
appearance: Thin human with ink-stained fingers, dented helm, and a sword belt adjusted with book cord.
voice: Nasal, exact, and apologetic before bad news.
mannerism: Quotes report numbers instead of names when nervous.
attitude: Anxious but morally stubborn.
tiny_backstory: He falsified one minor lateness record to help a widow and has feared paperwork ever since.
hook_or_secret: He found three arrest reports filed before the alleged crimes occurred.

name: Syllana Greyleaf
origin: A wood elf from misty border groves where warning songs carried farther than horns.
appearance: Quiet elf with bark-brown hair, fern tattoos, and a cloak patched with gray rabbit fur.
voice: Breathy alto that seems meant for trees, not rooms.
mannerism: Braids grass when deciding whether to trust someone.
attitude: Reserved, observant, and slow to forgive trespass.
tiny_backstory: She left her grove after admitting that the border stones had moved while she slept.
hook_or_secret: One border stone now bleeds sap when touched with iron.

name: Hilda Coppervein
origin: A dwarf from a coiners' guildhouse where lullabies named metals by weight and ring.
appearance: Compact dwarf woman with copper-threaded braids, thick gloves, and a burn mark shaped like a coin.
voice: Firm alto with a metallic rasp.
mannerism: Flicks coins beside her ear to hear if they are true.
attitude: Exacting, proud, and easily offended by fraud.
tiny_backstory: She took guard duty after counterfeit coins ruined her father's reputation.
hook_or_secret: The newest counterfeit rings perfectly because it was struck inside the mint.

name: Akra Clethtinthiallor
origin: A silver dragonborn scholar's daughter who chose watch pay over another decade of unpaid copying.
appearance: Silver-scaled dragonborn with blue robes over mail, ink-dark claws, and a chained reading lamp.
voice: Cool contralto with crisp consonants.
mannerism: Tilts her head to catch reflected text in glass cases.
attitude: Patient with readers, severe with thieves.
tiny_backstory: She knows the value of books because her family sold heirlooms to keep their small school open.
hook_or_secret: A banned genealogy vanished, but only the pages naming adopted children were cut out.

name: Nera Holt
origin: A widowed farmer from the east fields who learned supply by keeping six children fed through bad rain.
appearance: Strong human woman with gray-streaked hair, patched apron over mail, and a pencil behind one ear.
voice: Plainspoken alto that makes excuses wither.
mannerism: Tests fabric by rubbing it between thumb and forefinger.
attitude: Motherly in emergencies, ruthless with waste.
tiny_backstory: She joined the militia after raiders took winter stores while soldiers argued over chain of command.
hook_or_secret: Her grain tally proves someone is feeding a hidden squad outside town.

name: Elsa Mallow
origin: A human from a rye-growing village where ovens are shared and gossip travels with the starter dough.
appearance: Soft-armed woman with floury sleeves, a kerchief of blue checks, and tired hazel eyes.
voice: Warm alto that lowers around strangers after sundown.
mannerism: Presses thumbprints into loaves when worried.
attitude: Generous, practical, and protective of apprentices.
tiny_backstory: Her bakery survived a fire because neighbors formed a bucket line before asking who started it.
hook_or_secret: A noble's signet ring was baked into a charity loaf meant for the poorhouse.

name: Milo Appleblossom
origin: A halfling from terraced apple hills where every tree has a family name.
appearance: Sun-browned halfling with leaf-stuck curls, patched suspenders, and a pruning knife worn smooth.
voice: Easy tenor with a habit of humming harvest tunes.
mannerism: Offers sliced apple before difficult news.
attitude: Neighborly, patient, and slow to accuse.
tiny_backstory: He inherited the oldest orchard after his older siblings left for city trades.
hook_or_secret: One tree fruits only above a buried lockbox that hums during thunderstorms.

name: Dorin Ashkeg
origin: A hill dwarf whose kin turned coppiced woods into charcoal for village forges.
appearance: Soot-dark dwarf with a gray beard, leather apron, and eyebrows singed short.
voice: Smoky bass that cracks after long silence.
mannerism: Draws maps in ash with a stick.
attitude: Solitary, reliable, and suspicious of polished boots.
tiny_backstory: He chose forest kilns over mine work after a cave-in left him unable to sleep underground.
hook_or_secret: His newest charcoal pit uncovered bones wearing a fresh wedding bracelet.

name: Naivara Willowmere
origin: A wood elf from marsh-edge cottages where families braid reeds during winter floods.
appearance: Slender elf with willow-green eyes, damp hems, and fingers roughened by river reeds.
voice: Quiet, lilting, and full of long pauses.
mannerism: Weaves loose strands into patterns while listening.
attitude: Gentle, private, and sharper than she first appears.
tiny_backstory: She returned to the village to care for an aunt whose memory fails with every spring flood.
hook_or_secret: Her baskets have begun forming the same marsh map no matter what pattern she starts.

name: Kriv Yarjerit
origin: A red dragonborn from clay flats where kiln families trade glaze recipes like dowries.
appearance: Red-scaled dragonborn with clay under his claws, a cracked apron, and smoke-dark horn tips.
voice: Deep and warm, like a kiln opening.
mannerism: Turns any cup in his hands to check its balance.
attitude: Proud of good craft, embarrassed by praise.
tiny_backstory: He rebuilt the village kiln after his first firing exploded and ruined a season's work.
hook_or_secret: A pot he fired shows a face in the glaze that matches no villager alive.

name: Lilli Fizzleburr
origin: A rock gnome from a riverside hamlet that measures flood warnings by tower clock chimes.
appearance: Tiny gnome with silver curls, brass finger caps, and a vest full of labeled springs.
voice: Melancholy soprano with sudden bright sparks.
mannerism: Stops speaking whenever a clock skips a beat.
attitude: Kind, distracted, and intolerant of careless lies.
tiny_backstory: Her husband vanished at sea, and every repaired clock in her shop stopped the hour the news arrived.
hook_or_secret: Her clocks now stop near anyone lying about sea-deaths.

name: Grasha Fenhide
origin: An orc from bog pastures where goats learn to hop between peat islands before they learn fear.
appearance: Tall orc woman with a mud-brown cloak, copper nose ring, and a crook polished by rain.
voice: Rough alto that softens for animals.
mannerism: Clicks her tongue in different rhythms for people and goats.
attitude: Blunt, humorous, and unimpressed by rank.
tiny_backstory: She took over the herd after her mother lost a leg to a sinkhole and still walks every route herself.
hook_or_secret: Her goats refuse one patch of grass where the mud breathes at night.

name: Lucan Thorn
origin: A tiefling born beside the old cemetery wall, where his family kept graves neat when others would not.
appearance: Pale tiefling with backward-swept horns, black work gloves, and a coat dusted with pale soil.
voice: Soft tenor that treats the dead more formally than the living.
mannerism: Names the burial row before naming the person.
attitude: Polite, morbid, and quietly lonely.
tiny_backstory: He inherited the cemetery after villagers trusted his grandmother with every final secret.
hook_or_secret: Three graves are empty from below, but the surface soil has not been disturbed.

name: Amara Larkspur
origin: An aasimar raised in a sheep village where newborns were washed in warmed milk and old songs.
appearance: Brown-skinned woman with faintly luminous eyes, rolled sleeves, and a pouch of clean linen strips.
voice: Steady mezzo that makes panic feel wasteful.
mannerism: Counts breaths on her fingers when rooms grow tense.
attitude: Tender, firm, and done with superstition.
tiny_backstory: She trained under three village women who taught her that care matters more than omens.
hook_or_secret: Every child born this month has the same tiny birthmark behind the left ear.

name: Tarak Nulakavi
origin: A goliath from snowmelt valleys who learned river moods after coming down from the peaks.
appearance: Huge man with blue-gray markings, rope-burned hands, and a patched wool cap too small for him.
voice: Deep, laconic, and oddly soothing over water.
mannerism: Spits downstream before pushing off.
attitude: Stoic, helpful, and superstitious about fog.
tiny_backstory: He became a ferryman after carrying his ill sister across floodwater on his back.
hook_or_secret: He ferried the same silent passenger across the river three nights in a row, each time dripping lake water.

name: Jory Pike
origin: A human from low meadow cottages where pigs are more valuable than pride.
appearance: Lanky man with straw hair, mud-spattered knees, and a patched red scarf.
voice: Nervous tenor with unexpected flashes of wit.
mannerism: Scratches his ear whenever he has already guessed the answer.
attitude: Self-deprecating, observant, and desperate to be believed.
tiny_backstory: He became the village joke after claiming his best boar could smell strangers before they arrived.
hook_or_secret: The boar has started digging up coins stamped with a kingdom no one recognizes.

name: Sigrid Barleybraid
origin: A dwarf from a brewing family that settled aboveground to use spring water and wild barley.
appearance: Stout dwarf woman with honey-brown braids, rolled sleeves, and a necklace of carved tap handles.
voice: Laughing alto that can flatten a brawl.
mannerism: Polishes one mug until every rumor is finished.
attitude: Hospitable, shrewd, and protective of regulars.
tiny_backstory: She bought the alehouse with compensation from a mine injury no one now mentions.
hook_or_secret: A stranger has paid for the same empty corner table every new moon.

name: Erevan Duskwind
origin: An elf from a twilight grove who keeps hives beside human farms to study short seasons.
appearance: Graceful elf with amber beads in his dark hair, netted veil, and honey stains on green sleeves.
voice: Soft tenor with a smile hidden inside it.
mannerism: Moves slowly even when everyone else panics.
attitude: Patient, amused, and unwilling to rush grief.
tiny_backstory: He measures village years by which children stop fearing bees and begin stealing comb.
hook_or_secret: His queen bees have begun arranging dead drones into letters on the hive floor.

name: Perra Drachedandion
origin: A blue dragonborn from desert wells who married into a river village and learned every household by stains.
appearance: Blue-scaled dragonborn with rolled linen sleeves, soap chips on her horns, and a basket on one hip.
voice: Sharp contralto softened by dry humor.
mannerism: Sniffs cloth and names the road it traveled.
attitude: Practical, gossipy, and hard to intimidate.
tiny_backstory: She turned washing into a respected trade by finding lost tools, letters, and debts in pockets.
hook_or_secret: A cloak brought for washing bleeds seawater no matter how long it dries.

name: Borug Reedhand
origin: An orc from reed marsh families who roof half the village before winter storms.
appearance: Broad orc with green-gray skin, straw tucked behind one ear, and forearms striped by reed cuts.
voice: Booming laugh, quiet words.
mannerism: Looks at roofs before faces.
attitude: Gentle, proud, and shy around fine manners.
tiny_backstory: He learned thatching after losing a cousin to a collapsed wet roof and never rushed a job again.
hook_or_secret: From rooftops, he has seen candlelight moving inside the sealed chapel tower.

name: Sabina Ashbell
origin: A tiefling from a ropewalk family trusted with church bells but not church keys.
appearance: Violet-skinned tiefling with curled ram horns, hemp fibers in her braid, and calloused palms.
voice: Clear alto with a ringing laugh she uses sparingly.
mannerism: Tests knots by leaning her full weight into them.
attitude: Wry, careful, and hungry for respect.
tiny_backstory: She took over the ropewalk after her father died saving a bell ringer from a snapped line.
hook_or_secret: The chapel bell now rings once at midnight though her rope has been cut clean through.

name: Tobin Gearwhistle
origin: A forest gnome whose family carved festival toys from fallen branches and broken cart spokes.
appearance: Wrinkled gnome with walnut-brown skin, bright waistcoat, and pockets full of half-painted birds.
voice: Reedy tenor, kind but easily lost in thought.
mannerism: Makes toys face the door before discussing danger.
attitude: Sweet, anxious, and better informed than expected.
tiny_backstory: He began carving toys for children who hid in his cellar during a winter raid.
hook_or_secret: One wooden bird keeps returning to his bench with mud from the abandoned well.

name: Maveith Kolae-Gileana
origin: A goliath from upland sheep roads who stacks fieldstone walls that outlast owners.
appearance: Tall woman with chalk-white skin patterns, powerful hands, and a belt of measuring cords.
voice: Low and careful, as if placing each word.
mannerism: Balances stones in her palm when thinking.
attitude: Reserved, honest, and quietly sentimental.
tiny_backstory: She came to the village after losing a climbing wager that cost her pride, not her life.
hook_or_secret: Every wall she builds around one field falls outward by morning.

name: Ketta Rowan
origin: A human from a sheepfold village who learned letters from tax notices and taught everyone else for spite.
appearance: Thin woman with iron-gray hair, ink-smudged cuffs, and a ruler tucked into her belt.
voice: Crisp alto that softens for frightened children.
mannerism: Corrects grammar even in threats.
attitude: Strict, fair, and secretly romantic.
tiny_backstory: She opened the school in a granary after a lord mocked the village for signing with thumbprints.
hook_or_secret: A child's copybook contains a perfect confession written in an adult's hand.

name: Bree Honeypot
origin: A halfling from warm kitchen gardens where hens are named after relatives and judged just as harshly.
appearance: Plump halfling woman with freckled cheeks, yellow shawl, and straw clinging to her hem.
voice: Merry alto with sudden steel.
mannerism: Tucks found feathers into her braid.
attitude: Chatty, fearless, and deeply practical.
tiny_backstory: She kept the farm after her husband ran off with a traveling singer and left the hens behind.
hook_or_secret: Her black hen lays eggs with tiny rolled notes inside the shells.

name: Ilan Fairwater
origin: An aasimar born during a drought and raised beside the village well by practical grandparents.
appearance: Calm man with silver-flecked eyes, damp sleeves, and a rope scar circling one wrist.
voice: Clear tenor that echoes oddly near stone.
mannerism: Drops a pebble into water before answering hard questions.
attitude: Patient, devout in small ways, and wary of praise.
tiny_backstory: He maintains the well because his grandmother said clean water saves more lives than sermons.
hook_or_secret: At dawn, the well reflects a different sky with smoke on the horizon.

name: Theren Mossvale
origin: A wood elf who settled among human cottages to grow short-lived herbs with fierce seasonal fragrance.
appearance: Lean elf with moss-brown braids, green-stained fingertips, and rows of drying bundles over his shoulders.
voice: Mild, airy, and easily drowned out by louder people.
mannerism: Crushes leaves to scent the air before naming a fear.
attitude: Gentle, evasive, and observant of illness.
tiny_backstory: He came to the village after a forest blight made his old remedies useless.
hook_or_secret: His lavender turns black whenever it dries near one family's laundry.

name: Luga Hearthhand
origin: An orc raised in a crossroads hamlet where every traveler was fed before questions were asked.
appearance: Broad orc woman with a white apron, carved bone earrings, and steam curling around her tusks.
voice: Commanding alto with warmth under it.
mannerism: Serves second helpings to people who lie badly.
attitude: Maternal, blunt, and politically sharper than patrons expect.
tiny_backstory: She started the soup kitchen after a hungry deserter collapsed behind her family's shed.
hook_or_secret: One beggar leaves gold dust in the bowl every time he eats and denies it with tears.

name: Balin Kegmantle
origin: A hill dwarf whose goats graze old terraces abandoned by miners and claimed by thyme.
appearance: Round dwarf with white beard forks, milk-stained sleeves, and a blue wax seal stuck to one thumb.
voice: Cheerful bass that becomes a mutter around debts.
mannerism: Sniffs cheese wheels as if they might gossip first.
attitude: Hospitable, proud, and embarrassed by poverty.
tiny_backstory: He sells cheese to pay off the tools his daughter needed for apprenticeship.
hook_or_secret: One cheese wheel aged overnight into a hard black stone with a name carved inside.

name: Silas Fenwick
origin: A human from a lake village where every household owns a net and a story about what slipped through it.
appearance: Bent man with sunken cheeks, tarred fingers, and a cap sewn with fish bones.
voice: Thin, reedy, and stronger when speaking to children.
mannerism: Ties knots in loose thread while remembering names.
attitude: Sad, patient, and hard to surprise.
tiny_backstory: He mends nets for families who can no longer afford new rope after the lake catch failed.
hook_or_secret: A torn net brought him a lock of dry hair from a drowned woman who is still alive.

name: Bastian Crowe
origin: A human trader from loom towns where dyed fingers mark social standing as clearly as rings.
appearance: Lean man with indigo-stained nails, careful moustache, and sample ribbons pinned inside his coat.
voice: Smooth tenor that brightens around good fabric.
mannerism: Measures people by shoulder width before asking names.
attitude: Charming, calculating, and sentimental about apprentices.
tiny_backstory: He inherited a wagon of ruined cloth and rebuilt the business by selling scraps honestly.
hook_or_secret: One bolt of mourning black absorbs candlelight and was ordered by someone using a dead tailor's seal.

name: Magda Goldbuckle
origin: A dwarf from a smithing district who sells practical tools instead of weapons by family choice.
appearance: Square dwarf woman with iron-gray braids, a leather tool roll, and a gold buckle polished bright.
voice: Brisk alto with no patience for haggling theater.
mannerism: Balances every tool on one finger to prove its worth.
attitude: Exact, proud, and generous to competent workers.
tiny_backstory: She left her clan forge after refusing to make blades for a feud she considered childish.
hook_or_secret: Her best chisels are being bought up by one buyer carving tunnels under sealed property lines.

name: Caelynn Starfall
origin: An elf from moonlit gardens who learned which blossoms keep their scent after long sea crossings.
appearance: Elegant elf with dark violet hair, glass vials at her belt, and silver leaf paint on her eyelids.
voice: Velvet-soft and slightly amused.
mannerism: Names emotions by scent before naming facts.
attitude: Refined, curious, and watchful for grief.
tiny_backstory: She began trading perfume after preserving the smell of her mother's garden through a winter exile.
hook_or_secret: A vial labeled first rain smells exactly like the room where a missing duke was last seen.

name: Balasar Daardendrian
origin: A gold dragonborn from sun-baked spice warehouses where clan ledgers are recited at weddings.
appearance: Gold-scaled dragonborn with saffron dust along his jaw, embroidered sleeves, and a heavy abacus.
voice: Resonant, courteous, and edged with pride.
mannerism: Clicks abacus beads before giving even casual answers.
attitude: Formal, honorable, and wary of debt.
tiny_backstory: He took over trade routes after his mother lost ships to a storm and creditors circled like gulls.
hook_or_secret: His latest cinnamon shipment contains coded knots tied by sailors declared dead.

name: Tilda Bramblecup
origin: A halfling from misty hill gardens where every family blend is guarded by three aunties.
appearance: Cheerful halfling with a green traveling cloak, copper kettle pack, and tea tins painted with birds.
voice: Bright alto that can sell comfort by the cup.
mannerism: Smells steam before deciding whether to trust a room.
attitude: Warm, nosy, and quietly unflappable.
tiny_backstory: She began peddling tea after her village crop failed and discovered roads suited her better than fences.
hook_or_secret: One customer pays in pressed flowers from funerals that have not happened yet.

name: Riven Blackquill
origin: A tiefling from a scribe lane where his family made legal ink no magistrate could erase.
appearance: Blue-black tiefling with slender horns, stained cuffs, and a case of paper wrapped in oilskin.
voice: Dry tenor with a scholar's precision.
mannerism: Tests quills on his thumb instead of scrap paper.
attitude: Reserved, honest, and allergic to official bullying.
tiny_backstory: He lost a contract after refusing to dilute ink for a court that wanted records to fade.
hook_or_secret: A batch of his red ink reveals invisible names when held over warm bread.

name: Shara Flinttooth
origin: An orc from storm beaches whose family smokes fish in cliff caves and ships it inland.
appearance: Strong orc woman with sea-braided hair, a flint-capped tusk, and brine-crusted boots.
voice: Rough alto that carries across markets.
mannerism: Knocks twice on each barrel before opening it.
attitude: Forthright, funny, and ruthless about spoiled goods.
tiny_backstory: She rebuilt her mother's trade after a bad buyer spread lies about orcish food handling.
hook_or_secret: A sealed fish barrel contains dry sand from a desert she has never visited.

name: Fizzwick Puddleby
origin: A gnome from a riverport family of surveyors who trust smudges more than signatures.
appearance: Small gnome with ink freckles, round spectacles, and tubes of maps strapped across his back.
voice: Quick, bright, and full of corrections.
mannerism: Rotates every map north-up even when it annoys customers.
attitude: Helpful, fussy, and delighted by impossible routes.
tiny_backstory: He began selling maps after his brother disappeared following an outdated road through a drained marsh.
hook_or_secret: One map redraws itself each dawn to show a shorter road through walls.

name: Othak Mavakanathi
origin: A goliath from high kiln villages who carries heavy goods down switchback roads others fear.
appearance: Massive goliath with ocher skin markings, a cracked carrying frame, and careful hands.
voice: Low rumble, sparse and polite.
mannerism: Touches every crate once before agreeing it is secure.
attitude: Patient, dependable, and uneasy indoors.
tiny_backstory: He entered trade after injuring his knee in a climbing race and needing work below the peaks.
hook_or_secret: One sealed urn in his load whispers apologies whenever rain starts.

name: Liora Sunveil
origin: An aasimar from a candle-makers' lane where holy, household, and funeral wax all share one vat.
appearance: Golden-eyed woman with dark curls, wax-spotted sleeves, and a necklace of tiny brass snuffers.
voice: Low, calm, and unexpectedly businesslike.
mannerism: Pinches candle flames out with damp fingertips.
attitude: Kind, firm on price, and private about faith.
tiny_backstory: She learned the trade from an aunt who donated unsold candles to families too poor for wakes.
hook_or_secret: Her white candles burn blue in homes where someone has hidden stolen mourning jewelry.

name: Nadia Vale
origin: A human from grassland fairs where horse lineage is sung before price is spoken.
appearance: Tall woman with sun-cracked skin, riding gloves, and a silver comb tucked into a practical braid.
voice: Clear alto with a laugh like a handclap.
mannerism: Looks at a horse's ears before trusting its owner.
attitude: Bold, fair, and impatient with cruelty.
tiny_backstory: She quit breeding warhorses after seeing one gentle mare ruined by a lord's vanity.
hook_or_secret: A stolen horse keeps returning to her stable with saddle marks from an invisible rider.

name: Thrain Silvermug
origin: A dwarf from gem-cutting halls who moved aboveground to buy from miners before city brokers could cheat them.
appearance: Neat dwarf with a forked blond beard, velvet loupe case, and rings worn by size rather than value.
voice: Smooth bass that weighs words like stones.
mannerism: Holds gems against his lower lip to judge coldness.
attitude: Courteous, skeptical, and secretly sentimental.
tiny_backstory: He once overpaid for a flawed garnet because it matched his late husband's favorite glass cup.
hook_or_secret: A widow's plain brooch contains a flawless gem cut to fit an empty royal setting.

name: Riardon Leafwhisper
origin: An elf raised in a monastery library who now rescues damp, misbound, and unfashionable books.
appearance: Thin elf with copper hair, ink on his cheek, and a satchel reinforced for too many volumes.
voice: Soft, pedantic, and delighted by marginalia.
mannerism: Smells a book's spine before opening it.
attitude: Gentle, evasive about prices, and fierce about preservation.
tiny_backstory: He began trading books after saving a village ledger from a flood and learning names matter.
hook_or_secret: One children's primer contains fresh notes in the handwriting of a scribe dead for eighty years.

name: Nala Fenkenkabradon
origin: A green dragonborn from forest glassworks where sand, ash, and breath are family secrets.
appearance: Green-scaled dragonborn with a veil of glass beads, padded crate straps, and emerald flecks on her claws.
voice: Hushed contralto, careful around fragile things.
mannerism: Listens to glass rims sing after tapping them.
attitude: Elegant, cautious, and quietly competitive.
tiny_backstory: She travels to prove her workshop can survive without patronage from richer clans.
hook_or_secret: One mirror she cannot sell shows customers standing beside someone absent from the room.

name: Odo Goodbarrel
origin: A halfling from barley villages who can judge a granary by smell from the road.
appearance: Neatly dressed halfling with sandy curls, a green ledger, and barley awns stuck in his cuffs.
voice: Pleasant tenor that hardens over false weights.
mannerism: Bites one grain from every sample sack.
attitude: Amiable, exacting, and protective of small farms.
tiny_backstory: He became a factor after watching a drought broker ruin three neighboring families.
hook_or_secret: His ledgers show a village selling more grain than its fields could ever grow.

name: Iskra Redglass
origin: A tiefling from a red-windowed pawn street where every family learns the difference between value and need.
appearance: Crimson tiefling with swept horns, gold spectacles, and a black dress patched at the elbows.
voice: Silky alto with knife-edge courtesy.
mannerism: Dusts objects people cannot bear to touch.
attitude: Pragmatic, unsentimental in trade, merciful in private.
tiny_backstory: She inherited the shop from an uncle who forgave debts by hiding the records in plain sight.
hook_or_secret: A soldier pawned the same wedding ring three times, each ring engraved with a different spouse.

name: Keth Bonecart
origin: An orc from hunting camps that waste nothing and carve tools from what remains.
appearance: Lean orc with a bone-button coat, polished tusks, and a cart hung with antlers and combs.
voice: Dry bass with a habit of saying less than he knows.
mannerism: Runs a thumb over carved bone to read maker marks.
attitude: Quiet, practical, and offended by wastefulness.
tiny_backstory: He entered trade after selling horn buttons to pay for his sister's winter medicine.
hook_or_secret: A noble family crest keeps appearing in bones brought from different battlefields.

name: Pippa Nimbledock
origin: A gnome from a canal town where button stalls track marriages, mourning, uniforms, and scandal.
appearance: Bright-eyed gnome with pink ribbons, a tray of sorted buttons, and a thimble necklace.
voice: Fast soprano that can turn a sale into an interrogation.
mannerism: Sorts people by the buttons missing from their coats.
attitude: Cheerful, relentless, and very hard to fool.
tiny_backstory: She started with one box of salvaged buttons after a flood took her family's shop.
hook_or_secret: She owns a button from every coat worn by the village council on the night the clerk vanished.

name: Ilikai Anakathai
origin: A goliath from glacier camps who brings packed ice down to towns before dawn.
appearance: Tall woman with pale blue markings, fur shoulder wrap, and frost scars across her knuckles.
voice: Cool alto, clipped and practical.
mannerism: Judges coins by pressing them against ice for tarnish.
attitude: Direct, punctual, and annoyed by waste heat.
tiny_backstory: She turned seasonal ice cutting into steady trade after her clan lost too many elders in lean summers.
hook_or_secret: One block of ice contains a fresh rose that has not wilted after weeks.

name: Elias Brightcoin
origin: An aasimar raised by accountants at a hospice that sold donated goods to keep beds open.
appearance: Silver-eyed man with neat curls, an ivory gavel, and a coat mended with careful stitches.
voice: Warm baritone built for crowded halls.
mannerism: Touches the gavel to his heart before opening bids.
attitude: Sincere, persuasive, and quietly exhausted.
tiny_backstory: He learned auctioneering by turning grief donations into soup, linen, and medicine.
hook_or_secret: A donated music box plays the private lullaby of every bidder who touches it.

name: Corra Flint
origin: A human from tar marshes where oil families know which flames smoke and which ones sing.
appearance: Freckled woman with cropped black hair, stained apron, and small burn scars along her wrists.
voice: Flat alto, more honest than friendly.
mannerism: Caps bottles immediately after smelling them.
attitude: Blunt, reliable, and wary of officials.
tiny_backstory: She took over the stall after her brother died in a warehouse fire blamed on cheap oil.
hook_or_secret: Someone is buying smokeless oil under the names of households already burned out.

name: Althaea Silverreed
origin: An elf from reedbed conservatories where flutes, lutes, and mourning songs are repaired with equal care.
appearance: Willowy elf with silver braids, narrow hands, and instrument cases wrapped in rainproof silk.
voice: Clear and musical even when bargaining.
mannerism: Tunes a string before answering questions about the past.
attitude: Graceful, melancholy, and quietly exacting.
tiny_backstory: She began trading instruments after her voice failed and she needed music to remain near her.
hook_or_secret: One cracked flute plays only the tune whistled by a vanished caravan guard.

name: Medrash Shestendeliath
origin: A copper dragonborn from terraced vineyards who treats every cask like a difficult relative.
appearance: Copper-scaled dragonborn with green patina at the jaw, stained tasting cup, and silk sash over travel clothes.
voice: Rich baritone with theatrical sighs.
mannerism: Swirls any liquid before smelling it, including soup.
attitude: Sociable, vain, and honest about quality.
tiny_backstory: He left the family vineyard after refusing to relabel sour wine as noble vintage.
hook_or_secret: A cask from his old vineyard arrives full of river stones carved with apology marks.

name: Finnan Thistlewick
origin: A halfling from laundry courts who learned to spot fortunes and tragedies by sleeve wear.
appearance: Dapper halfling with a plum waistcoat, measuring tape scarf, and mismatched but immaculate shoes.
voice: Light tenor, fast and confidential.
mannerism: Smooths lapels on mannequins that are not there.
attitude: Kind, opportunistic, and painfully discreet.
tiny_backstory: He began selling secondhand clothes after dressing refugees from a flood with donations nobody wanted.
hook_or_secret: A plain coat in his stock bleeds fresh ink from an inner pocket every dawn.

name: Nemeia Brasswick
origin: A tiefling from a locksmith alley where apprentices learned ethics before tumblers.
appearance: Ochre-skinned tiefling with brass-capped horns, green gloves, and keys stitched along her belt.
voice: Low alto with a teasing precision.
mannerism: Names locks by the sound they make when offended.
attitude: Clever, guarded, and protective of honest customers.
tiny_backstory: She opened her stall after exposing a master locksmith who sold duplicate keys to burglars.
hook_or_secret: A key she never made keeps appearing in her till, warm from a lock she cannot find.

name: Brottor Coppervein
role: cooper who makes travel barrels and rain casks
origin: Raised in a hill dwarf cellar-town where every family mark is burned into oak.
appearance: Broad-shouldered, sawdust in his beard, copper rings braided beside one singed eyebrow.
voice: Low and tapping, as if every sentence is tested for leaks.
mannerism: Knocks twice on any wooden surface before agreeing to terms.
attitude: Practical, dryly funny, generous only after the price is settled.
tiny_backstory: He left the clan shop after refusing to stamp a noble's watered wine as temple-grade.
hook_or_secret: One cask in his yard hides a map burned into the inner staves.

name: Lethariel Moonwhittle
role: maker of lutes, flutes, and courtly music boxes
origin: From an elven river enclave where instrument wood is chosen by moonlit listening.
appearance: Willow-thin, silver hair pinned with tuning pegs, fingertips polished smooth by varnish.
voice: Soft, exact, and faintly amused when others rush.
mannerism: Tilts her head to hear the pitch of a person's footsteps.
attitude: Helpful to sincere artists, frosty toward loud buyers with heavy purses.
tiny_backstory: She once built a harp for a grieving captain and never charged the final payment.
hook_or_secret: A broken music box on her bench repeats the name of a missing heir.

name: Mara Vellum
role: potter known for sturdy blue-glazed crockery
origin: Born beside a clay bank that stains human hands pale gray for days.
appearance: Stocky, clay-specked braids tucked under a kerchief, one sleeve always rolled higher.
voice: Warm, blunt, and quick to laugh at bad luck.
mannerism: Shapes invisible bowls in the air while thinking.
attitude: Neighborly but suspicious of anyone who asks too much about kiln schedules.
tiny_backstory: A kiln fire ruined her first shop, and the village rebuilt it one brick at a time.
hook_or_secret: Her new glaze cracks only when exposed to poison fumes.

name: Arjhan Kepeshkmolik
role: bronze caster of hinges, bells, and shrine plates
origin: From a dragonborn foundry quarter where clan names are stamped under every casting.
appearance: Green-scaled, heat-scarred snout, horn tips capped in soot-dark bronze.
voice: Resonant and formal, with a furnace rasp on long words.
mannerism: Holds hot metal a heartbeat longer than seems wise.
attitude: Proud, disciplined, and secretly delighted by small compliments.
tiny_backstory: He apprenticed under his aunt after his clutchmates chose soldiering and trade.
hook_or_secret: A bell he cast rings by itself when a certain masked patron enters town.

name: Pippa Underbough
role: baker of road pies and festival breads
origin: Raised in a halfling caravan bakery where ovens were strapped to mule carts.
appearance: Round-cheeked, flour on her curls, bright waistcoat patched with tiny wheat sheaves.
voice: Cheerful, fast, and impossible to interrupt without feeling rude.
mannerism: Tastes a pinch of flour before judging anyone's story.
attitude: Comic, motherly, and frighteningly sharp about debts.
tiny_backstory: She fed a winter camp for free and still remembers who never came back to pay.
hook_or_secret: A smuggler uses her raisin rolls to pass coded messages.

name: Nackle Fizzgear
role: clockmender and maker of fussy little locks
origin: From a gnome burrow-town famous for clocks that announce tea, taxes, and gossip.
appearance: Tufted white hair, jeweled goggles, vest pockets ticking at different speeds.
voice: Squeaky, precise, and offended by vague measurements.
mannerism: Answers questions by winding a key that is not attached to anything.
attitude: Curious, fidgety, and braver with a workbench between him and trouble.
tiny_backstory: He once fixed the town clock wrong on purpose to give a runaway bride an extra hour.
hook_or_secret: His latest lock opens only when it hears a child's nursery rhyme.

name: Grasha Ironcord
role: leatherworker who makes harnesses and rainproof boots
origin: Born to an orc drover family that crossed salt flats with patched wagons.
appearance: Tall, tusked grin, black hair tied with leather thongs, arms marked by awl scars.
voice: Gruff, teasing, and louder than she realizes.
mannerism: Pulls at seams until weak stitching confesses.
attitude: Protective, earthy, and unimpressed by polished manners.
tiny_backstory: She learned fine stitching from a retired saddler who owed her mother a life debt.
hook_or_secret: A noble's saddle in her shop is cut to fail during a parade.

name: Malcer Ravencord
origin: From a tiefling lane where night markets glow with horn-shaped lanterns.
appearance: Ruby skin, swept black horns, smoked spectacles, sleeves glittering with glass dust.
voice: Silky, sardonic, and careful around promises.
mannerism: Turns every cup to catch the light before drinking.
attitude: Charming until insulted, then politely merciless.
tiny_backstory: He rebuilt his furnace after neighbors blamed him for a fire he warned them about.
hook_or_secret: One crimson lamp reveals invisible ink when its flame is fed salt.

name: Serene Vale
role: silversmith of buckles, votive charms, and mourning rings
origin: Raised in a human temple ward where her aasimar glow was treated as a work lamp and omen.
appearance: Bronze skin with faint gold freckles, close-cropped curls, apron stitched with silver thread.
voice: Calm, resonant, and unexpectedly tired.
mannerism: Polishes the same ring when talk turns to family.
attitude: Compassionate but firm about payment and boundaries.
tiny_backstory: She left temple service to make ordinary things people could actually hold.
hook_or_secret: A mourner ordered a ring engraved with tomorrow's date of death.

name: Kavaak Stonebrace
role: mason who repairs bridges, wells, and old walls
origin: From a goliath cliffhold where children learn stone grain before letters.
appearance: Huge and careful, slate-gray tattoos, stone dust whitening his shaved scalp.
voice: Slow, gravelly, and gentle with nervous clients.
mannerism: Lays one palm flat against masonry before speaking indoors.
attitude: Patient, helpful, and stubborn once he names a structure unsafe.
tiny_backstory: He came downhill after an avalanche taught him that pride is poor mortar.
hook_or_secret: He found a bricked-over passage under the courthouse and has not reported it.

name: Hilda Emberhand
role: blacksmith who favors hinges, nails, and honest farm tools
origin: A forge-born dwarf from a mountain hold that measured status by useful repairs.
appearance: Muscular, red beard braided short, burn scars like pale rivers on both forearms.
voice: Firm, clipped, and warmest when discussing good iron.
mannerism: Quenches arguments by slamming tongs into a bucket.
attitude: Bluntly fair, allergic to flattery, soft toward apprentices.
tiny_backstory: She quit weapon contracts after seeing her best sickle design copied into a cruel blade.
hook_or_secret: A farmer's plowshare she forged bears blood that will not wash off.

name: Thalanil Starbark
role: bowyer and patient mender of cracked walking sticks
origin: From an elven woodland hamlet where each bow is named for the tree that gave it.
appearance: Copper hair, leaf-green cloak, long hands stained with sap and charcoal.
voice: Measured, airy, and quietly teasing.
mannerism: Looks past people to judge the wind before answering.
attitude: Gentle, watchful, and reluctant to sell to angry hands.
tiny_backstory: He made hunting bows for refugees one bad winter and still receives dried apples in thanks.
hook_or_secret: A cracked walking stick in his rack contains a rolled confession.

name: Tomas Reedwick
role: weaver of sailcloth, blankets, and cheap bright ribbons
origin: Born in a human river town where looms rattled louder than taverns.
appearance: Lean, ink-dark beard, measuring cord around his neck, sleeves full of loose thread.
voice: Nasal, friendly, and full of small complaints.
mannerism: Counts knots under his breath when anxious.
attitude: Helpful if treated plainly, fussy if rushed, secretly romantic.
tiny_backstory: He inherited three looms and a pile of debts from a mother everyone loved.
hook_or_secret: His patterned ribbons mark safe houses for workers fleeing a cruel mill owner.

name: Akra Fenkenkabradon
role: enamelist who decorates shields, tiles, and family seals
origin: A blue dragonborn from a coastal clan that records marriages in colored tile.
appearance: Blue scales, white kiln veil, one cracked horn wrapped with painted copper wire.
voice: Clear, brisk, and crackling with impatience.
mannerism: Arranges pigments by clan association instead of color.
attitude: Exacting, proud, and surprisingly sentimental about ugly heirlooms.
tiny_backstory: She crossed the sea to prove her craft could outlast salt wind and snobbery.
hook_or_secret: A customer's family seal includes a forbidden crest hidden beneath fresh enamel.

name: Bimble Tinkertack
role: jeweler who turns broken keepsakes into new settings
origin: From a rock gnome warren where every engagement ring has at least one moving part.
appearance: Tiny, bright-eyed, pink hair in springs, magnifying lens clipped to one brow.
voice: Rapid, delighted, and prone to confidential whispers.
mannerism: Hides her tools in her hair and forgets which curl holds which file.
attitude: Kind, nosy, and impossible to shock.
tiny_backstory: She made mourning brooches after a mine collapse and learned everyone's secrets by accident.
hook_or_secret: A cracked ruby brought to her contains a miniature portrait of a living judge.

name: Odo Greenkettle
role: small-batch brewer of ales, tonics, and questionable ciders
origin: Raised among halfling orchard folk who treat each barrel like a stubborn cousin.
appearance: Rosy-nosed, curly sideburns, waistcoat strained by sample spoons and corks.
voice: Merry, bubbling, and louder after every taste.
mannerism: Sniffs the air and names three impossible ingredients.
attitude: Hospitable, evasive about recipes, brave only behind his taproom counter.
tiny_backstory: His first batch exploded during a wedding and somehow improved the marriage.
hook_or_secret: A sour cider shipment was swapped with bottles that induce truthful rambling.

name: Borug Ashhide
role: tattooist and maker of ceremonial inks
origin: An orc from ashland camps where tattoos record oaths, jokes, and debts alike.
appearance: Heavy tusks, charcoal skin, arms covered in layered blue-black script.
voice: Quiet and gravel-soft, forcing loud people to lean in.
mannerism: Taps his needle case against his tusk when weighing a lie.
attitude: Respectful, guarded, and serious about consent.
tiny_backstory: He stopped tattooing war marks after a cousin begged him to cover one with flowers.
hook_or_secret: One client asked for a false exile mark and paid with stolen temple ink.

name: Nemeia Duskwick
role: dyer of funeral blacks and scandalously vivid festival cloth
origin: Born in a tiefling riverside neighborhood where dye vats steamed beside laundry lines.
appearance: Lavender skin, curling ivory horns, hands stained indigo to the wrist.
voice: Dry, musical, and never quite innocent.
mannerism: Names colors after people she dislikes.
attitude: Witty, practical, and fiercely loyal to repeat customers.
tiny_backstory: She learned trade recipes from three widows who trusted her more than their sons.
hook_or_secret: Her newest black dye reveals fresh blood as silver streaks.

name: Varega Flintstep
role: bone carver of buttons, combs, dice, and memorial charms
origin: From a goliath high pass where nothing useful is wasted after a hunt.
appearance: Towering, snow-pale eyes, gray braids, necklace of unfinished carved buttons.
voice: Flat, honest, and unexpectedly delicate when praising craft.
mannerism: Rolls a blank die across her knuckles while listening.
attitude: Severe with hagglers, quietly tender with the bereaved.
tiny_backstory: She came down from the pass to sell memorial charms and stayed for steady soup.
hook_or_secret: A set of bone dice keeps rolling the same street number.

name: Calem Dawnridge
role: candle maker for shrines, sickrooms, and nervous sailors
origin: Raised by human chandlers who used his aasimar shimmer to check wax purity.
appearance: Golden eyes, dark skin, neat beard, apron dotted with wax moons.
voice: Gentle, weary, and steady enough to calm a room.
mannerism: Pinches candlewicks straight when conversation grows crooked.
attitude: Helpful, pious in a practical way, and embarrassed by praise.
tiny_backstory: He began making vigil candles after a plague year left too many windows dark.
hook_or_secret: A candle ordered for a funeral burns blue whenever the supposedly dead person's name is spoken.

name: Velvet Under Rain
role: embroiderer of banners, cuffs, and secret pockets
origin: A tabaxi from a rainy port clan where stories are stitched into cloak hems.
appearance: Smoke-gray fur, green eyes, silver thimble claws, tail looped around a thread basket.
voice: Purring, observant, and delighted by dramatic pauses.
mannerism: Pats fabric flat even when nothing is wrinkled.
attitude: Playful, discreet, and mildly predatory about unpaid invoices.
tiny_backstory: She learned noble heraldry by mending parade banners no one thought she could read.
hook_or_secret: A banner she is repairing has a second crest hidden in old stitch holes.

name: Irena Chalk
role: sign painter and maker of cheap theater scenery
origin: A city human raised above a paint shop that faced three taverns and a debt office.
appearance: Tall, freckled, paint on her chin, coat sleeves decorated with accidental sunsets.
voice: Bright, theatrical, and wicked with mimicry.
mannerism: Sketches people's noses in the margins of invoices.
attitude: Comic, resilient, and loyal to underpaid performers.
tiny_backstory: She painted fake marble for a bankrupt theater and kept the stage alive another season.
hook_or_secret: A new shop sign she delivered now shows a different name after midnight.

name: Szordrin Tlintarn
role: lace maker and repairer of fine veils
origin: A drow refugee from cavern courts where lace patterns carried family warnings.
appearance: White hair in a severe braid, violet eyes, black gloves dusted with pale thread.
voice: Smooth, careful, and edged with old caution.
mannerism: Checks windows by reflection in his needle case.
attitude: Suspicious, elegant, and unexpectedly kind to frightened apprentices.
tiny_backstory: He bought his freedom with a veil that made a cruel matron look unfashionable.
hook_or_secret: A wedding veil in his shop is stitched with directions to a sealed cellar.

name: Nadarr Turnuroth
role: tile setter who lays bathhouse floors and shrine mosaics
origin: A brass dragonborn from dry plains where bright tile cools rooms and honors ancestors.
appearance: Brass scales, square jaw, chalk lines across his apron and forearms.
voice: Booming, friendly, and prone to over-explaining geometry.
mannerism: Spots crooked lines from across a crowded street.
attitude: Helpful, proud of clean work, quick to feud with sloppy contractors.
tiny_backstory: He rebuilt a burned bathhouse floor for free after the neighborhood sheltered his sister.
hook_or_secret: A shrine mosaic he uncovered has tiles newer than the supposed ancient curse.

name: Shava Amberleaf
role: perfumer and distiller of practical insect balms
origin: From an elven garden house where scent recipes are memorized as family songs.
appearance: Amber eyes, braided black hair, stained glass vials hanging from a leather sash.
voice: Cool, lyrical, and faintly judgmental about bad soap.
mannerism: Identifies visitors by scent before looking up.
attitude: Elegant, useful, and less delicate than customers assume.
tiny_backstory: She moved to the docks because sailors pay faster than courtiers and complain less.
hook_or_secret: A custom perfume she sold can be tracked through rain for three days.

name: Elowen Hartwell
role: tax assessor with a memory for false widows and missing goats
origin: Born to minor human gentry who lost land but kept the family ledgers.
appearance: Neat gray riding coat, ink-stained fingers, auburn hair pinned with brass needles.
voice: Crisp, courteous, and impossible to hurry.
mannerism: Corrects sums in the air with two fingers.
attitude: Fair, suspicious, and kinder to the poor than her office allows.
tiny_backstory: She took the assessor post after her father died owing taxes he helped invent.
hook_or_secret: Her private ledger proves the richest estate has paid under a dead cousin's name.

name: Caelthas Irongrove
origin: An elf from a treaty grove where children learn apology forms before archery.
appearance: Tall, silver-green robes, ink-black hair, thin spectacles chained with seed pearls.
voice: Velvet-smooth and lethally precise.
mannerism: Pauses exactly long enough for others to realize they misspoke.
attitude: Polite, calculating, and protective of clerks under his charge.
tiny_backstory: He survived three court reshuffles by making himself more useful than fashionable.
hook_or_secret: He keeps a drawer of unsigned treaty pages that could ruin two houses.

name: Dain Ledgershield
role: customs comptroller at the city gate
origin: A dwarf from a tollhouse clan that considers arithmetic a family martial art.
appearance: Square beard, iron spectacles, dark blue sash heavy with stamped permit seals.
voice: Rumbling, exact, and dry as old parchment.
mannerism: Weighs coins by sound before looking at them.
attitude: Rigid but not cruel, with a soft spot for honest carts.
tiny_backstory: He once exposed his uncle's bribe network and has eaten alone at holidays since.
hook_or_secret: A shipment he cleared legally contains a second manifest in invisible wax.

name: Kava Norixius
role: magistrate for market quarrels and contract breaches
origin: A red dragonborn raised in a clan court where spoken promises were recited at dinner.
appearance: Crimson scales, gold-edged judicial collar, polished horns, claws capped for court.
voice: Commanding, warm when amused, thunderous when lied to.
mannerism: Scrapes one claw once across the bench before delivering judgment.
attitude: Stern, theatrical, and determined to be remembered as fair.
tiny_backstory: She took the bench after winning a contract case against her own merchant kin.
hook_or_secret: A condemned trader has proof that one of her judgments was forged before she signed it.

name: Merric Burrowside
role: deputy registrar of births, deaths, and puzzling middle names
origin: From a halfling civic family whose kitchen table served as the village records office.
appearance: Small, tidy, sandy curls, green waistcoat with too many carefully labeled pockets.
voice: Pleasant, apologetic, and firm after the third correction.
mannerism: Licks his thumb before turning even imaginary pages.
attitude: Helpful, anxious, and secretly proud of catching fraud.
tiny_backstory: He became registrar after memorizing every neighbor's birthday to improve cake planning.
hook_or_secret: Three newborn records list the same old midwife who has been dead for years.

name: Vespera Lowglass
origin: A tiefling dock child who learned the law by watching captains dodge it.
appearance: Deep blue skin, swept silver horns, pearl buttons, salt-stiff cloak hem.
voice: Smoky, amused, and painfully clear on fees.
mannerism: Balances a permit stamp on one fingertip when bored.
attitude: Suspicious, witty, and loyal to dockworkers over ship owners.
tiny_backstory: She inherited the office after her mentor drowned in a storm everyone calls convenient.
hook_or_secret: She has a list of ships licensed under names that belong to children.

name: Quilla Nimblequill
role: archive clerk who controls map access
origin: A gnome from a burrow library where shelves moved more often than residents.
appearance: Copper curls, round spectacles, ink-smudged nose, robe hem stitched with index numbers.
voice: Tiny, brisk, and sharp enough to slice excuses.
mannerism: Files insults alphabetically under her breath.
attitude: Territorial, helpful to polite researchers, gleeful when rules matter.
tiny_backstory: She saved the archive from a flood by cataloging books into a bucket brigade.
hook_or_secret: One forbidden map has fresh crumbs folded inside it.

name: Oryn Brightmere
role: charity auditor for temples and relief houses
origin: An aasimar foundling raised by human accountants who mistrusted miracles and bad receipts.
appearance: Soft halo-like sheen, brown robes, clean-shaven face, ledger chain across one shoulder.
voice: Gentle, sorrowful, and exact about numbers.
mannerism: Closes his eyes before accusing anyone.
attitude: Compassionate, relentless, and tired of holy excuses.
tiny_backstory: He entered service after discovering a beloved soup kitchen had been selling donated grain.
hook_or_secret: His audit notes implicate the only priest who treated him kindly as a child.

name: Rogad Thrice-Sealed
role: ward captain responsible for night notices and curfew fines
origin: An orc veteran from a border watch where law was nailed to posts before dawn.
appearance: Heavy jaw, broken left tusk, official cloak patched over an old mail shirt.
voice: Hoarse, direct, and louder when trying to be gentle.
mannerism: Taps posted notices to test whether the paste has set.
attitude: Gruffly protective, impatient with noble complaints, wary of mobs.
tiny_backstory: He accepted the ward post to keep younger guards from learning cruelty as policy.
hook_or_secret: Someone uses his seal on curfew notices he never ordered.

name: Nalla Highledger
role: road commissioner for bridges and mile markers
origin: A goliath descended from cliff path keepers who counted lives saved, not tolls collected.
appearance: Very tall, braided white hair, weather maps tattooed across one shoulder.
voice: Calm, echoing, and patient with workers.
mannerism: Measures distances in strides before trusting a surveyor.
attitude: Sensible, hard to bribe, and quietly furious about neglected villages.
tiny_backstory: She entered office after a washed-out bridge killed a cousin and three mules.
hook_or_secret: Her inspection route found a new road that appears on no royal plan.

name: Morna Goldstitch
origin: A dwarf of a declining hall that traded mining rights for a court title and headaches.
appearance: Black beard in gold thread loops, severe gown, signet rings worn over work-callused fingers.
voice: Rich, biting, and impatient with drama she did not schedule.
mannerism: Sorts petitions into piles by moral odor.
attitude: Haughty, efficient, and unexpectedly fair to servants.
tiny_backstory: She saved the family estate by reading every creditor contract herself.
hook_or_secret: One petition accuses her brother of selling empty titles to desperate merchants.

name: Edwin Marrowmere
role: young noble chairing the granary board
origin: A human heir from marshland estates where grain, gossip, and fever all travel by barge.
appearance: Pale, overdressed, carefully curled hair, gloves too clean for any granary.
voice: Nervous, refined, and eager to sound decisive.
mannerism: Quotes advice from dead relatives at the wrong moment.
attitude: Well-meaning, insecure, and easily steered by confident villains.
tiny_backstory: He inherited the board when his older sister renounced the title for a sailor.
hook_or_secret: He signed an emergency grain order without noticing the recipient village does not exist.

name: Patrin Daardendrian
role: court herald and keeper of formal challenges
origin: A silver dragonborn from a clan that treats names as armor to be polished daily.
appearance: Silver scales, deep purple tabard, high crest polished with scented oil.
voice: Sonorous, ceremonial, and incapable of whispering well.
mannerism: Announces even small errands as if presenting a duel.
attitude: Grand, loyal, and secretly afraid he is ridiculous.
tiny_backstory: He became herald after losing his nerve in battle and finding courage in a loud room.
hook_or_secret: A sealed challenge in his custody names a noble who has been dead for months.

name: Sarya Velathiel
role: water rights adjudicator for farms and mills
origin: An elf from an old canal commune where a dry ditch is considered a public shame.
appearance: Dark gold skin, river-blue cloak, hair braided with small clay measuring tabs.
voice: Cool, patient, and quietly relentless.
mannerism: Draws flowing lines on tabletops during disputes.
attitude: Impartial, stubborn, and sympathetic to families without lawyers.
tiny_backstory: She memorized river law after watching her village lose a spring to forged deeds.
hook_or_secret: Her latest survey shows a millrace diverted into a noble's private fish pond.

name: Melech Redledger
role: deputy coroner and keeper of pauper burial records
origin: A tiefling raised behind an undertaker's office where paperwork mattered to the dead.
appearance: Rust-red skin, short black horns, inked cuffs, eyes ringed by sleepless violet shadows.
voice: Soft, mordant, and precise about unpleasant facts.
mannerism: Counts pulse beats on his own wrist when annoyed.
attitude: Grimly humorous, compassionate, and immune to intimidation by rank.
tiny_backstory: He took the coroner's office after too many nameless bodies became civic statistics.
hook_or_secret: A pauper grave receipt bears the seal of a noble household that denied knowing the body.

name: Rosie Tumblebrook
origin: A halfling from a fairground family that knows every lawful way to block a street.
appearance: Dimpled, sharp-eyed, flowered bonnet, belt hung with ribbons and brass permit tags.
voice: Sweet, fast, and edged like a paper cut.
mannerism: Smiles wider each time someone underestimates her.
attitude: Cheerful, bureaucratically ruthless, and fond of honest buskers.
tiny_backstory: She wrote her first crowd safety plan after a runaway cheese wheel injured six uncles.
hook_or_secret: Someone requested a funeral parade permit for a person attending tomorrow's banquet.

name: Fendrick Cogwhistle
role: inspection officer for lifts, pulleys, and tavern dumbwaiters
origin: A gnome from a mining town where bad ropes were remembered longer than bad mayors.
appearance: Bald crown, huge mustache, yellow safety sash, boots with chalk marks on the toes.
voice: Reedy, indignant, and full of numbered clauses.
mannerism: Tugs every rope within reach, including curtain cords.
attitude: Fussy, brave around machinery, cowardly around dogs.
tiny_backstory: He lost two friends to a cheap hoist and decided permits could be heroic.
hook_or_secret: A condemned lift in the opera house moves only when no inspector is watching.

name: Ilyra Sunmantle
origin: An aasimar born into a human legal family that advertised her glow before her grades.
appearance: Warm brown skin, faint luminous eyes, cream robes, hair wrapped in a copper scarf.
voice: Measured, tired, and sharper than her gentle face suggests.
mannerism: Removes one glove before making any ruling.
attitude: Just, suspicious of sentiment, and wounded by public adoration.
tiny_backstory: She chose inheritance law because grief makes liars careless and honest people desperate.
hook_or_secret: A will she validated includes a witness signature in her own handwriting.

name: Sharga Bonequill
role: clerk of complaints for the lower wards
origin: An orc from a crowded tenement where every family kept a grievance jar.
appearance: Green-gray skin, gold nose ring, inked tusk tips, sleeves rolled above strong wrists.
voice: Flat, patient, and dangerous when called sweetheart.
mannerism: Stamps papers harder as nonsense increases.
attitude: Exhausted, fair, and violently opposed to queue cutting.
tiny_backstory: She learned letters from a retired bailiff who traded lessons for soup.
hook_or_secret: She has collected thirty complaints about the same alley door that no map shows.

name: Thovak Graniteoath
origin: A goliath from a mountain guard lodge hired south after proving too honest for mercenary work.
appearance: Massive, shaved head, formal coat straining at the shoulders, old shield scars on one cheek.
voice: Quiet, blunt, and difficult to ignore.
mannerism: Places himself between arguments before noticing he moved.
attitude: Loyal, suspicious of luxury, and fond of competent cooks.
tiny_backstory: He inherited stewardship duties when his patron discovered he could read accounts better than heirs.
hook_or_secret: He is hiding a missing servant in the linen room until he knows whom to trust.

name: Mira Palevein
role: identity verification clerk for licenses and inheritances
origin: A changeling raised by caravan notaries who taught her that names are tools and burdens.
appearance: Soft gray features, white lashes, plain black dress, face deliberately kept unremarkable.
voice: Neutral, soothing, and hard to remember afterward.
mannerism: Mirrors a visitor's posture, then stops when they notice.
attitude: Professional, wary, and quietly amused by terrible disguises.
tiny_backstory: She accepted the clerkship to make lawful identities harder to steal.
hook_or_secret: She recently certified someone using a face she wore ten years ago.

name: Bastian Crowleigh
origin: A human stable boy who rose by remembering which courtiers lied about delivery times.
appearance: Lean, weathered face, black courier cape, silver whistle on a braided cord.
voice: Rapid, raspy, and never as casual as it sounds.
mannerism: Checks doorways before finishing any sentence.
attitude: Suspicious, efficient, and protective of young riders.
tiny_backstory: He once rode through floodwater with a peace offer and still limps in the rain.
hook_or_secret: A sealed message vanished from his locked dispatch tube without breaking the seal.

name: Sannl Stonesum
role: treasury examiner sent to audit frontier towns
origin: A dwarf from a coiners' guild where children were scolded for uneven stacks.
appearance: Compact, silver beard beads, travel cloak lined with hidden abacus strings.
voice: Dry, brisk, and delighted by arithmetic traps.
mannerism: Smiles only when numbers disagree.
attitude: Suspicious, fearless in offices, miserable on horseback.
tiny_backstory: She exposed three town treasurers before learning to sleep with her ledger under her pillow.
hook_or_secret: Her audit found expenses for a bridge built over a river that dried up decades ago.

name: Nyrielle Dawnscribe
role: censor of public broadsheets and theatrical notices
origin: An elf from a scholarly household that debated satire until breakfast went cold.
appearance: Gold-rimmed eyes, black hair in a severe knot, red correction wax on her sleeves.
voice: Elegant, clipped, and secretly fond of good insults.
mannerism: Raises one eyebrow exactly when a line becomes treason-adjacent.
attitude: Restrained, conflicted, and more principled than her office title suggests.
tiny_backstory: She took the post to keep worse censors from burning harmless words.
hook_or_secret: She has been quietly preserving banned notices that predict crimes before they happen.

name: Rhogar Verthisathurgiesh
role: senior ration officer for garrison stores
origin: A bronze dragonborn from a military clan that treats inventory loss as personal dishonor.
appearance: Bronze scales, scarred muzzle, heavy keys at his belt, uniform sleeves patched with care.
voice: Blunt, metallic, and weary of excuses.
mannerism: Counts sacks while maintaining eye contact.
attitude: Severe, honest, and surprisingly tender toward hungry children.
tiny_backstory: He became ration officer after surviving a siege where spoiled flour killed more than arrows.
hook_or_secret: He has found a pattern of ration theft that points inside the command tent.

name: Silas Crowe
role: lock broker who sells keys, rumors, and excuses
origin: A human alley child raised above a locksmith until both trade and owner disappeared.
appearance: Narrow face, oil-black hair, patched gloves, smile that arrives a second late.
voice: Low, friendly, and always testing the room.
mannerism: Rubs thumb and forefinger as if feeling key teeth.
attitude: Helpful for coin, suspicious for free, loyal only to old debts.
tiny_backstory: He learned locks honestly before hunger taught him faster lessons.
hook_or_secret: He refuses to copy one particular brass key because it once opened his sister's cell.

name: Kallista Smokeveil
role: smuggler of perfumes, letters, and embarrassing heirlooms
origin: A tiefling born in the customs shadow of a river bridge where everyone learned two prices.
appearance: Charcoal skin, swept violet horns, veil scented with cloves, boots too fine for mud.
voice: Luxurious, teasing, and cool under threat.
mannerism: Lets perfume bottles decide which lie she will tell.
attitude: Flirtatious, practical, and vengeful about cheated crews.
tiny_backstory: She began smuggling love letters for dockhands before discovering nobles paid better for shame.
hook_or_secret: Her current parcel contains an heirloom that whispers apologies in a dead woman's voice.

name: Erevan Thistlecut
role: pickpocket who poses as a street poet
origin: An elf from a fading garden district where art patrons stopped paying before artists stopped eating.
appearance: Loose green scarf, copper eyes, nimble fingers inked with fake verse fragments.
voice: Lilting, tragic, and a little too rehearsed.
mannerism: Bows after stealing, whether or not anyone noticed.
attitude: Comic, vain, and softer than his reputation.
tiny_backstory: He stole his first purse to buy medicine for a singer who still hates him for it.
hook_or_secret: One poem he recites is actually a spy drop schedule.

name: Brenna Blackvault
role: fence for stolen tools and heirloom silver
origin: A dwarf from a banker's clan that disowned her for appraising sentiment above collateral.
appearance: Dark braided beard, heavy amber earrings, apron lined with secret receipt slips.
voice: Gravelly, maternal, and hard as a locked strongbox.
mannerism: Bites coins, then bites insults harder.
attitude: Suspicious, protective of thieves who keep rules, merciless with oathbreakers.
tiny_backstory: She opened a pawn counter after learning respectable vaults hide uglier thefts.
hook_or_secret: She has a stolen spoon engraved with the crest of a house that claims poverty.

name: Balasar Clethtinthiallor
role: dockside muscle who moves contraband crates
origin: A white dragonborn from a northern fishing clan that lost its boats to debt law.
appearance: White scales, scarred shoulder, rope burns on both palms, breath steaming in warm rooms.
voice: Cold, blunt, and startlingly honest about illegal work.
mannerism: Stacks crates into perfect squares when nervous.
attitude: Practical, loyal to crews, impatient with clever criminals.
tiny_backstory: He entered smuggling to buy back his clan's last net house and never quite left.
