hook_or_secret: He is hiding a crate of medicine from the gang that paid to move it.

name: Tansy Quickstep
role: confidence trickster specializing in fake lucky charms
origin: A halfling fairground runaway who learned that every crowd wants to believe one small thing.
appearance: Bright smile, mismatched earrings, yellow scarf, pockets jingling with carved buttons.
voice: Sweet, breathless, and full of friendly secrets.
mannerism: Touches her own charms before selling them as if even she is convinced.
attitude: Comic, slippery, and ashamed when children are involved.
tiny_backstory: She started with harmless button charms and slid into fraud after a winter of empty bowls.
hook_or_secret: One charm in her tray is genuine and terrifies her because it keeps finding its buyer.

name: Pibbin Underclock
role: forger of permits, seals, and polite apologies
origin: A gnome from a clocktower district where his family repaired official timepieces and unofficial lies.
appearance: Brown curls, magnifying spectacles, ink-stained cuffs, waistcoat buttons shaped like seals.
voice: Nervous, quick, and proud despite himself.
mannerism: Blows on documents even when the ink is long dry.
attitude: Anxious, funny, and morally flexible in very specific directions.
tiny_backstory: He forged his first doctor's note to avoid choir practice and discovered a market.
hook_or_secret: A seal he copied began appearing on documents dated before he was born.

name: Mazga Redhook
role: river pirate lookout turned black-market guide
origin: An orc from reed marsh camps where children learn fog paths before road names.
appearance: Tall, green skin, red scarf, one tusk capped with copper, bare feet hardened by marsh shells.
voice: Rough, amused, and fond of insulting directions.
mannerism: Reads ripples the way others read faces.
attitude: Suspicious, helpful for fair pay, soft toward lost travelers.
tiny_backstory: She left piracy after a raid hit a refugee barge instead of a tax boat.
hook_or_secret: She knows where the river hides a sunken chest chained to a living tree.

name: Lucan Veilbright
role: spy posing as a shrine singer
origin: An aasimar from a choir school where his radiant presence opened doors and emptied secrets.
appearance: Soft golden glow, tired blue eyes, plain singer's robe, dagger hidden in a hymn case.
voice: Beautiful, mournful, and controlled to the last breath.
mannerism: Hums the first note of a hymn before lying.
attitude: Gentle, guilty, and determined to survive his employers.
tiny_backstory: He sold secrets to pay for his brother's treatment and became too useful to release.
hook_or_secret: His next song includes a coded warning meant for someone in the audience.

name: Rokka Slatejaw
origin: A goliath from a storm pass who came downhill to find wages steadier than goats.
appearance: Broad, slate tattoos, broken nose, neat ledger tucked into a fur-lined belt.
voice: Quiet, heavy, and more frightening for never rising.
mannerism: Cracks walnuts with two fingers while discussing payment plans.
attitude: Practical, intimidating, and oddly fair to honest debtors.
tiny_backstory: She took collector work after a mine cheated her crew and learned the wrong lessons from power.
hook_or_secret: She is secretly buying debt notes to forgive them before her boss notices.

name: Ilvara Zauvirr
role: information broker trading in court whispers
origin: A drow exile from underground salons where gossip was served sharper than wine.
appearance: White bobbed hair, obsidian skin, silver lip chain, cloak lined with coded embroidery.
voice: Silken, bored, and dangerous when entertained.
mannerism: Repeats a person's last word as if tasting it.
attitude: Suspicious, elegant, and kinder to outcasts than clients expect.
tiny_backstory: She fled after selling a truth that spared a servant and doomed her own patron.
hook_or_secret: She knows which courtier hires assassins but refuses to name them without proof of protection.

name: Nessa Vale
role: cardsharp and organizer of backroom games
origin: A human mill worker's daughter who learned cards from night-shift gamblers hiding from foremen.
appearance: Short black curls, quick hands, burgundy coat, smile chipped by one missing tooth.
voice: Warm, quick, and mean only when cornered.
mannerism: Shuffles anything flat, including warrants.
attitude: Friendly, reckless, and fiercely protective of regular losers.
tiny_backstory: She started running games to keep drunk workers from betting with predatory lenders.
hook_or_secret: A noble has been losing state seals at her table on purpose.

name: Clink-of-Copper
role: eavesdropper who sells perfect stolen voices
origin: A kenku raised in a bell market where imitation could earn supper or a beating.
appearance: Black feathers, copper trinkets tied to his collar, bright bead eyes, inked feet.
voice: A patchwork of borrowed tones, often repeating a merchant's laugh before bad news.
mannerism: Tilts his head until a speaker fills the right ear.
attitude: Skittish, greedy, and surprisingly sentimental about songs.
tiny_backstory: He once used a dead guard's voice to comfort the guard's child and never forgave himself.
hook_or_secret: He can repeat the exact phrase that opened a locked council chamber last night.

name: Sora Myastan
role: arsonist for hire who now only burns empty buildings
origin: A brass dragonborn from kiln alleys where fire was work before it became temptation.
appearance: Brass scales dulled by ash, cropped horns, burn veil, fingers stained with lampblack.
voice: Dry, smoky, and almost bored by threats.
mannerism: Smells lamp oil before entering a room.
attitude: Detached, suspicious, and strict about innocent bystanders.
tiny_backstory: She quit lethal jobs after a tenement fire left her carrying strangers down the stairs.
hook_or_secret: Her newest client wants a warehouse burned after moving nothing out of it.

name: Finnan Lowbarrel
role: cellar smuggler using tavern basements and laundry carts
origin: A halfling brewer's son from a lane where every cellar connects if you are small enough.
appearance: Curly brown hair, patched cap, muddy knees, grin full of plausible innocence.
voice: Bright, hushed, and offended by accusations he cannot monetize.
mannerism: Checks floorboards by bouncing on his heels.
attitude: Helpful, cheeky, and terrified of deep water.
tiny_backstory: He began moving untaxed ale and accidentally became the fastest courier under the market.
hook_or_secret: One cellar tunnel now opens into a room that was not there last week.

name: Mirael Duskwind
role: spy disguised as a dance tutor
origin: An elf from a decayed noble school where posture, knives, and politics shared a classroom.
appearance: Graceful, raven hair, soft slippers, pearl-handled hairpin placed like a weapon.
voice: Patient, musical, and cold below the courtesy.
mannerism: Corrects stance while extracting secrets.
attitude: Elegant, practical, and lonely from too many borrowed identities.
tiny_backstory: She entered espionage after teaching noble children whose parents vanished servants for sport.
hook_or_secret: Her latest student has been feeding her false secrets to test who employs her.

name: Lilli Sprocketlace
role: trapmaker for burglars who prefer noise elsewhere
origin: A gnome carnival mechanic who discovered applause and alarms use similar springs.
appearance: Wild auburn hair, soot freckles, tiny tool belt, patched skirt full of brass teeth.
voice: Cheery, technical, and unconcerned by explosions.
mannerism: Apologizes to devices before disarming them.
attitude: Comic, brilliant, and bad at judging personal risk.
tiny_backstory: She built harmless prank boxes until a thief paid triple for a door that screamed.
hook_or_secret: A trap she sold has been modified to kill, and she wants it back.

name: Drog Halfcoin
role: counterfeit courier moving fake silver through market stalls
origin: An orc raised near a mint where rejected coins were swept out like gravel.
appearance: One clipped ear, gray-green skin, heavy coat with hidden coin tubes.
voice: Flat, wary, and unexpectedly polite to children.
mannerism: Spins coins and catches them without looking.
attitude: Suspicious, practical, and tired of being the obvious suspect.
tiny_backstory: He took courier work after honest portering paid in coins that turned out to be false anyway.
hook_or_secret: He can identify the official mint die used for the fake silver.

name: Whisper Between Tiles
role: rooftop burglar who steals only documents
origin: A tabaxi from tiled desert cities where roof paths were faster than streets.
appearance: Sand-colored fur, amber eyes, soft wrapped paws, satchel stitched with roofline marks.
voice: Quiet, amused, and full of little purrs at clever locks.
mannerism: Tests ledges with his tail before stepping.
attitude: Curious, vain, and offended by messy desks.
tiny_backstory: He turned from jewelry to documents after discovering paper ruins powerful people better.
hook_or_secret: He stole a blank page that every spy in town now wants back.

name: Orsik Cinderpurse
role: illegal pawnbroker with a talent for alibis
origin: A dwarf from a smelter town where lost goods often walked home wearing new names.
appearance: Ash-gray beard, red waist sash, thick fingers covered in appraisal chalk.
voice: Warm, gravelly, and always two steps from denial.
mannerism: Writes prices on his palm, then forgets to wash them off.
attitude: Jovial, evasive, and loyal if treated like a person instead of a sewer rat.
tiny_backstory: He became a pawnbroker to pay a sister's guild dues and stayed for the stories.
hook_or_secret: He holds a noble's signet ring pledged by someone using the noble's face.

name: Tavia Gloam
origin: An aasimar raised as a charity mascot until she learned how donors behaved after speeches.
appearance: Dim silver aura, severe black coat, cropped curls, eyes like cloudy glass.
voice: Soft, disappointed, and sharp enough to draw blood.
mannerism: Reads apology letters before accepting threats.
attitude: Bitter, careful, and more merciful to honest sinners than saints.
tiny_backstory: She began collecting secrets after a relief fund vanished and everyone praised the thief.
hook_or_secret: Her next target is innocent, and she knows it, but the evidence says otherwise.

name: Petra Sable
role: safehouse keeper for fugitives, spies, and unlucky lovers
origin: A human innkeeper's daughter who learned that spare rooms can save lives or sell them.
appearance: Broad face, black braid, plain brown dress, ring of keys worn under her collar.
voice: Matter-of-fact, low, and never surprised enough.
mannerism: Listens at floorboards before opening upstairs doors.
attitude: Practical, maternal, and ruthless about house rules.
tiny_backstory: She hid her first fugitive by mistake and chose not to correct the mistake.
hook_or_secret: One guest in her attic claims to be the real city treasurer.

name: Marek Tideglass
role: canal smuggler who moves sealed jars beneath barges
origin: A water genasi born in a canal neighborhood where tide marks were family calendars.
appearance: Sea-green skin, dark wet curls, glass bead necklace, coat hem always dripping.
voice: Fluid, relaxed, and slippery around direct questions.
mannerism: Tracks conversations by making ripples in his cup.
attitude: Charming, evasive, and superstitious about still water.
tiny_backstory: He began hiding medicine beneath barges during a quarantine and learned every canal grate.
hook_or_secret: A jar he transported contains a preserved hand wearing a council ring.

name: Mordai Ashwink
role: spy handler who runs messages through gambling debts
origin: A tiefling accountant's son from a smoky district where everyone owed someone twice.
appearance: Wine-red skin, narrow gold horns, immaculate cuffs, one eye clouded from an old beating.
voice: Dry, intimate, and never louder than necessary.
mannerism: Arranges coins into constellations while assigning jobs.
attitude: Controlled, suspicious, and sentimental about competent fools.
tiny_backstory: He built his network after debt collectors ruined his father and taught him leverage.
hook_or_secret: One of his couriers has started sending messages in a code he did not teach.

name: Faelariel Nightreed
role: grave robber who specializes in documents buried with the dead
origin: An elf from a marsh cemetery village where reeds grew through old family vaults.
appearance: Pale hair, mud-dark cloak, bone-handled trowel, mourning veil pushed above green eyes.
voice: Soft, practical, and too respectful for her profession.
mannerism: Apologizes to graves before opening them.
attitude: Melancholy, careful, and offended by needless desecration.
tiny_backstory: She began recovering buried deeds for widows cheated by living relatives.
hook_or_secret: The latest coffin she opened was empty except for fresh ink and warm wax.

name: Mara Vey
origin: Born above a cooper's shop in a river toll town.
appearance: Ink-stained cuffs, gray braid pinned with a bone stylus, careful dark eyes.
voice: Low, dry, and exacting.
mannerism: Taps each page corner twice before reading.
attitude: Helpful if treated with patience.
tiny_backstory: She taught herself letters by copying tax marks from barrel lids.
hook_or_secret: Knows which families quietly paid double after last winter's flood.

name: Theren Lumaer
origin: Raised in a cedar cloister where songs were stored as braided cords.
appearance: Fine copper hair, green cloak smelling of cedar, silver-thread prayer knots.
voice: Soft, melodic, with long pauses.
mannerism: Hums the first note of any title he names.
attitude: Courteous but slow to trust hurried people.
tiny_backstory: He left home after arguing that common work songs deserved copying too.
hook_or_secret: Collects lullabies from dockworkers and hides them in the temple index.

name: Brynna Ironledger
origin: From a basalt hall where births are chiseled into stair risers.
appearance: Square spectacles, soot-black apron, beard beads marked with family runes.
voice: Gruff, warm, and louder than needed.
mannerism: Counts kinship lines on her knuckles.
attitude: Bluntly kind to anyone who respects ancestors.
tiny_backstory: She memorized seven feuding family trees to stop a wedding brawl.
hook_or_secret: Suspects two rival smith lines share the same great-grandmother.

name: Kriv Delmirev
origin: Sent from a dragonborn trading house to learn soft-tongued law.
appearance: Brass scales polished at the brow, blue writing gloves, heavy seal case.
voice: Resonant, clipped, faintly smoky.
mannerism: Warms wax seals in his palm before stamping.
attitude: Formal until someone jokes honestly.
tiny_backstory: His clan values contracts, but he prefers marginal notes and witness gossip.
hook_or_secret: Can identify three noble hands that signed the same lie.

name: Nedda Candlewick
origin: From a hill parish famous for beeswax and practical blessings.
appearance: Round face, yellow shawl, pockets full of wick trimmings and prayer slips.
voice: Bright, quick, and neighborly.
mannerism: Sniffs every candle before lighting it.
attitude: Cheerful, with a steel spine under the smile.
tiny_backstory: She took over the shrine after her aunt lost confidence in thunder season.
hook_or_secret: Believes blue-flamed candles mean someone nearby is lying about love.

name: Malcer Voss
origin: Raised in a funeral lane where neighbors paid in favors, not coin.
appearance: Wine-red skin, swept black horns, mourning sash patched with tiny names.
voice: Smooth, grave, and never rushed.
mannerism: Dusts ash from his sleeves even when clean.
attitude: Patient with grief, sharp with greed.
tiny_backstory: He learned law by reading wills aloud to widows who could not read.
hook_or_secret: Keeps a sealed codicil that would embarrass half the market council.

name: Nissa Fizzlespark
origin: From a windmill hamlet where gnomes track storms by kettle song.
appearance: Copper goggles, cloud-gray curls, coat stitched with tiny rain symbols.
voice: Fast, airy, and delighted by details.
mannerism: Checks a pocket vane before answering questions.
attitude: Eager, distracted, rarely offended.
tiny_backstory: A hail year ruined her family's orchard, so she began recording sky patterns.
hook_or_secret: Her almanac predicts a dry fog locals claim brings bad dreams.

name: Rogar Thrice-Read
origin: From a ridge clan that preserves treaties as sung boasts.
appearance: Broad green-gray shoulders, shaved head, tusks capped in plain iron.
voice: Measured, rough, and surprisingly gentle.
mannerism: Repeats foreign words under his breath until they sit right.
attitude: Protective of beginners and old books.
tiny_backstory: He learned three scripts to prove an insult in a treaty was a bad translation.
hook_or_secret: Hides homesickness by volunteering for every late watch in the library.

name: Seren Valoris
origin: Found as an infant on the steps of a dawn chapel after a meteor shower.
appearance: Warm brown skin with a faint golden sheen, white scarf, steady hands.
voice: Clear, calm, and lightly musical.
mannerism: Presses two fingers to her wrist before giving advice.
attitude: Compassionate, but wary of being worshiped.
tiny_backstory: She chose bandages over sermons after seeing fever take more lives than sin.
hook_or_secret: Her halo-glow appears only during ordinary acts of care, which unnerves her.

name: Kavun Stonecall
origin: From a high pass settlement that reads seasons in glacier cracks.
appearance: Towering frame, pale stone-marked skin, slate tablet strapped across his back.
voice: Deep, slow, and weather-worn.
mannerism: Looks at shadows before he looks at faces.
attitude: Steady, respectful, uncomfortable indoors.
tiny_backstory: He came downhill to compare lowland planting days with mountain thaw signs.
hook_or_secret: Fears the old pass is melting too early but has not told his elders.

name: Orsik Coppervein
origin: From a mining chapel where ledgers are blessed before pickaxes.
appearance: Bronze beard rings, patched vest, one eyebrow singed from candle audits.
voice: Nasal, precise, and stubborn.
mannerism: Licks his thumb before counting anything, even beads.
attitude: Suspicious until the numbers balance.
tiny_backstory: He once caught a thief by noticing a missing half-candle in the accounts.
hook_or_secret: The donation box has been heavier on foggy mornings, with no footprints.

name: Aelthia Moonreed
origin: From a willow village that redraws river maps after every spring flood.
appearance: Blue-black hair, stained fingertips, leaf-shaped earrings, rolled vellum tube.
voice: Cool, attentive, with a river-lilt.
mannerism: Traces coastlines in the air while thinking.
attitude: Polite but protective of her drafts.
tiny_backstory: She lost a cousin to a bad ford and now marks even minor footbridges.
hook_or_secret: Her newest map shows a village road slowly shifting north each year.

name: Joren Pike
origin: Grew up on the wharf, learning letters from crate brands and sailors' mail.
appearance: Salt-chapped cheeks, patched blue coat, reed pen tucked behind one ear.
voice: Plainspoken, hoarse, and kind.
mannerism: Reads each sentence back twice to nervous clients.
attitude: Practical, discreet, mildly nosy.
tiny_backstory: He writes love letters for people who smell too strongly of fish to visit town.
hook_or_secret: Knows three crews are planning to leave before the herring run ends.

name: Harann Norixius
origin: From an ash-colored dragonborn quarter where names are sung to cooling stones.
appearance: Black scales with silver flecks, white ash veil, carved throat pendant.
voice: Rich, vibrating, and mournful.
mannerism: Touches her pendant before speaking a dead person's name.
attitude: Dignified, unsentimental, deeply observant.
tiny_backstory: She trained after her mother forgot a cousin's death-verse and wept for years.
hook_or_secret: Has noticed the same unknown mourner at four unrelated burials.

name: Boddynock Nackle
origin: From a cellar workshop beneath a public reading room.
appearance: Tufted white hair, green spectacles, waistcoat dusted with paper fibers.
voice: Squeaky, cheerful, and a little apologetic.
mannerism: Smells glue pots like fine wine.
attitude: Anxious around fire, generous with knowledge.
tiny_backstory: A childhood lamp accident made him devote himself to saving damaged books.
hook_or_secret: Keeps singed pages that whisper names only during rain.

name: Ilyra Duskhorn
origin: Raised by bell ringers in a crowded temple district.
appearance: Lavender skin, swept ivory horns, black gloves, belt of tiny brass bells.
voice: Crisp, bright, and faintly teasing.
mannerism: Silences one bell at her belt when displeased.
attitude: Witty, exacting, loyal to the overlooked.
tiny_backstory: She adds feast days for humble local dead when the high priests are not looking.
hook_or_secret: Tomorrow's saint day was moved to avoid a donor's birthday scandal.

name: Tobin Goodbarrel
origin: From a crossroads inn where guests carved family marks into beams.
appearance: Curly brown hair, flour-dusted sleeves, spectacles always slipping.
voice: Mild, sing-song, and politely nosy.
mannerism: Adds kinship notes to napkins while chatting.
attitude: Friendly to everyone, especially strangers with old surnames.
tiny_backstory: He began tracing families to settle arguments over who owed the taproom tab.
hook_or_secret: A beam mark matches a supposedly extinct merchant family.

name: Calem Brightshore
origin: From a storm coast where every tower keeps a prayer ledger.
appearance: Sea-dark skin with faint silver freckles, oilskin stole, lantern-callused hands.
voice: Warm, carrying, and steady in wind.
mannerism: Tilts his head as if listening through walls.
attitude: Hospitable, quietly tired.
tiny_backstory: He records names of ships that pass safely, even those that never dock.
hook_or_secret: A ship listed as safe keeps appearing in the ledger on moonless nights.

name: Sharga Inktooth
origin: From a grain bazaar where spoken deals are scratched onto clay tags.
appearance: Olive skin, silver nose ring, ink-dark tusk tip, sleeveless red robe.
voice: Firm, amused, and impossible to talk over.
mannerism: Bites a clay tag before filing it.
attitude: Fair, impatient with clever loopholes.
tiny_backstory: She learned contracts from her grandmother, who settled disputes with a ladle.
hook_or_secret: Her clay shelf shows one merchant swearing by three different names.

name: Ekuva Flintstep
origin: Raised among cliff courts where judgments are remembered by stone stacks.
appearance: Tall, slate-blue tattoos, fur-lined formal mantle, slate chips braided into hair.
voice: Low, even, and solemn.
mannerism: Builds tiny stone piles while listening.
attitude: Patient, stern, impossible to flatter.
tiny_backstory: She came to the lowlands to study written law after a wrongful exile.
hook_or_secret: Her stones fall whenever a witness repeats a rehearsed lie.

name: Scratch-of-Chalk
origin: From a bell tower rookery beside a charity school.
appearance: Glossy black feathers, chalky claws, patched teacher's scarf.
voice: Borrowed snippets of teachers, children, and bell tones.
mannerism: Arranges chalk sticks by the voices he associates with them.
attitude: Shy, diligent, proud of neat work.
tiny_backstory: He learned letters by echoing lessons through a cracked classroom window.
hook_or_secret: Can perfectly repeat the argument the headmaster denies ever happened.

name: Sabine Holt
origin: From a fen village where midwives trade plant notes in recipe books.
appearance: Freckled, moss-green kerchief, fingernails stained by roots and gall ink.
voice: Matter-of-fact, soft around the sick.
mannerism: Presses leaves flat between any two clean pages.
attitude: Helpful, skeptical of grand theories.
tiny_backstory: She began correcting old herbals after one bad drawing poisoned a neighbor.
hook_or_secret: Local mint has started blooming blue after the last strange fog.

name: Vaelis Starbark
origin: From an old grove where elven births and debts are etched into living bark.
appearance: Silver hair, bark-brown robes, sap stains on long fingers.
voice: Quiet, solemn, slightly hoarse.
mannerism: Closes his eyes before naming the past.
attitude: Gentle, but stubborn about accuracy.
tiny_backstory: He left the grove to settle arguments among young elves born far from home.
hook_or_secret: A family tree he carries has a branch scraped away by someone careful.

name: Hilda Runegrip
origin: From a road chapel where dwarves bless names carved for safe travel.
appearance: Granite-gray braid, chisel-scarred hands, blue travel cloak over vestments.
voice: Clear, ringing, and practical.
mannerism: Tests stone with one knuckle before any conversation.
attitude: Warm to travelers, fierce with vandals.
tiny_backstory: She became a priest after a roadside blessing helped her lost brother find home.
hook_or_secret: Someone has been adding tiny backward letters to the north milestones.

name: Erez Thornvale
origin: Born in a poor orchard parish where frost claims are argued every spring.
appearance: Ochre skin, small swept horns, ink-black coat, tired amber eyes.
voice: Polite, clipped, and faintly sardonic.
mannerism: Straightens stacks whenever someone mentions fairness.
attitude: Cautious, sympathetic to small farmers.
tiny_backstory: His family survived one winter because a clerk found an overlooked exemption.
hook_or_secret: The frost reports are real, but only on farms beside one old stone wall.

name: Darin Vale
origin: From a barley village two days south of the old toll bridge.
appearance: Sunburned face, patched pack frame, boots wrapped with red cord.
voice: Raspy, quick to bargain.
mannerism: Shakes every pouch before opening it.
attitude: Friendly, but counting exits.
tiny_backstory: He left home to sell needles and combs after his brothers divided the farm.
hook_or_secret: Carries gossip that the toll bridge keeper now charges by shadow length.

name: Bree Appleblossom
origin: From a river bend orchard where halfling families bless first apples.
appearance: Rosy cheeks, travel-stained apron, copper pot tied to a walking stick.
voice: Warm, bustling, and impossible to ignore.
mannerism: Feeds people before asking their names.
attitude: Trusting, with a sharp eye for hunger.
tiny_backstory: She walks to a hill shrine each year for her late wife's birthday.
hook_or_secret: Refuses to sleep under ash trees because of a family superstition.

name: Liarel Dawnpetal
origin: From a lake town where elven artisans tint glass with reed ash.
appearance: Amber eyes, pale green cloak, satchel of wrapped colored panes.
voice: Light, precise, and wistful.
mannerism: Holds glass chips up to every sunrise.
attitude: Reserved, softer with children.
tiny_backstory: She travels because her workshop view was blocked by a new granary.
hook_or_secret: Claims red dawn glass shows storms a day before clouds arrive.

name: Kargun Hillmantle
origin: From a limestone quarry camp abandoned after the water table rose.
appearance: Broad nose, dusty red beard, cracked hammer wrapped in cloth.
voice: Deep, blunt, and tired.
mannerism: Tests walls with his palm as he passes.
attitude: Guarded, grateful for honest work.
tiny_backstory: He carried his apprentices out when the lower quarry flooded at dawn.
hook_or_secret: Keeps dreaming of hammer blows coming from under still water.

name: Farideh Verthisathurgiesh
origin: From a bronze-scaled dragonborn family that escorts spice carts across dry flats.
appearance: Bronze scales, sand scarf, shield scar across one horn.
voice: Gravelly, controlled, and amused by fools.
mannerism: Counts wheels before counting people.
attitude: Professional, hungry for steady pay.
tiny_backstory: A broken axle cost her last caravan three days and her employer's trust.
hook_or_secret: Believes a certain road mile always breaks the left rear wheel.

name: Riven Ashcour
origin: From a dye house quarter where tiefling horns are polished with indigo paste.
appearance: Blue-gray skin, violet-stained fingers, narrow horns wrapped in linen.
voice: Quiet, quick, and defensive.
mannerism: Keeps checking if his cuffs hide dye marks.
attitude: Suspicious of masters, kind to servants.
tiny_backstory: He fled after ruining a noble's wedding cloth and being blamed for more than that.
hook_or_secret: Knows the expensive black dye was watered down long before he touched it.

name: Tana Timbersprocket
origin: From a gearwright lane where gnome families keep household shrine clocks.
appearance: Frizzy auburn hair, brass magnifier, coat pockets ticking softly.
voice: Rapid, bright, and full of tiny corrections.
mannerism: Winds a little shrine clock whenever anxious.
attitude: Curious, apologetic, hard to discourage.
tiny_backstory: She is walking to return a clock that chimed through her father's funeral.
hook_or_secret: The clock runs fast only when pointed toward the marsh road.

name: Vesha Redtusk
origin: From a scrubland orc camp where goat bells carry family marks.
appearance: Tall, weathered green skin, red-painted tusk, cloak of woven goat hair.
voice: Dry, practical, and low.
mannerism: Clicks her tongue like calling goats when thinking.
attitude: Wary, proud, tired of pity.
tiny_backstory: She lost half her herd when raiders burned the winter thorn pens.
hook_or_secret: Can identify a stolen goat bell by sound from across a market.

name: Oren Lightwell
origin: From a mill town where dawn services are held beside the waterwheel.
appearance: Soft gold eyes, worn linen robe, bandaged feet, simple wooden sun charm.
voice: Gentle, strained, and honest.
mannerism: Counts steps between prayers.
attitude: Humble, easy to embarrass.
tiny_backstory: He walks barefoot after failing to visit his sick brother before harvest.
hook_or_secret: The mill cats follow him for miles, which locals take as an omen.

name: Manua Skyridge
origin: From a mountain goliath lodge that trades ice salt for lowland grain.
appearance: Very tall, pale gray skin patterns, rope harness, frost-bitten ear tip.
voice: Booming laugh, few words.
mannerism: Rolls shoulder knots against doorframes.
attitude: Good-natured unless cheated.
tiny_backstory: She sends coin home to a younger brother who fears heights.
hook_or_secret: Says the high trail smelled of flowers in deep snow this year.

name: Elianora Crest
origin: From a manor village where tenants know more than heralds.
appearance: Plain brown cloak, fine boots too clean for the road, signet hidden on a cord.
voice: Careful, educated, and strained.
mannerism: Avoids giving her surname unless pressed.
attitude: Polite, frightened of recognition.
tiny_backstory: She left after her uncle announced a marriage she never agreed to.
hook_or_secret: Her maid is spreading false rumors to buy her more time.

name: Saeris Windwillow
origin: From a reed marsh village where elves guide boats by flute calls.
appearance: Long moss-brown hair, reed flute case, cloak hem stained with marsh water.
voice: Airy, distant, and kind.
mannerism: Answers awkward questions with three flute notes.
attitude: Peaceful, but quietly stubborn.
tiny_backstory: He travels to play at shrines his grandmother named before she forgot them.
hook_or_secret: One shrine on his list is not on any current map.

name: Dagna Coalbraid
origin: From a deep furnace town evacuated after the vents began coughing sparks.
appearance: Black braid, soot-grimed cheeks, iron lunch pail held like a keepsake.
voice: Hoarse, blunt, and dryly funny.
mannerism: Checks ceilings for cracks wherever she sleeps.
attitude: Tough, protective of other displaced workers.
tiny_backstory: She was a night stoker and woke the barracks before the smoke turned foul.
hook_or_secret: Her lunch pail contains tiny stones that stay warm away from any fire.

name: Rhogar Daardendrian
origin: From a red-scaled dragonborn clan that settles disputes by public promises.
appearance: Deep red scales, travel cloak clasped with a broken promise-ring, heavy sandals.
voice: Rumbling, solemn, and direct.
mannerism: Repeats any agreement aloud before moving on.
attitude: Earnest, humorless about debts.
tiny_backstory: He carries apologies between cousins who refuse to share a hearth.
hook_or_secret: Privately doubts whether one apology he bears is sincere.

name: Nyxara Coalvine
origin: From a fairground row swept away when the river changed course overnight.
appearance: Deep purple skin, curled black horns, patched shawl sewn with old ticket stubs.
voice: Husky, playful, and evasive.
mannerism: Turns a copper coin over her knuckles when nervous.
attitude: Charming, private, quick to read a room.
tiny_backstory: Her mother read fortunes; Nyxara read customers and kept them fed.
hook_or_secret: Keeps drawing the same crooked bridge in every casual doodle.

name: Milo Tealeaf
origin: From a halfling hamlet that judges distance by kettle boils.
appearance: Dusty green coat, round cap, tea tins clinking in a sling bag.
voice: Friendly whisper, even in loud rooms.
mannerism: Offers tea before bad news.
attitude: Polite, quick-footed, hard to corner.
tiny_backstory: He delivers family letters hidden under harmless tea orders.
hook_or_secret: One tin always smells of rain, no matter what leaves are inside.

name: Warryn Copperknob
origin: From a busy print alley where gnomes sell cheap route sheets to drovers.
appearance: Ink-smudged nose, orange scarf, tube case stuffed with questionable maps.
voice: Fast, nasal, and overly confident.
mannerism: Folds maps into birds when embarrassed.
attitude: Optimistic, unreliable, eager to make amends.
tiny_backstory: He set out to prove his maps worked and immediately took the wrong road.
hook_or_secret: His worst map accurately marks every abandoned well in the county.

name: Mugra Ashfield
origin: From an orc farming clan that follows harvests across three valleys.
appearance: Broad straw hat, green arms corded with muscle, sickle wrapped in linen.
voice: Slow, warm, and gravelly.
mannerism: Measures fields by squinting along his thumb.
attitude: Patient, careful with tools and tempers.
tiny_backstory: He travels to earn seed money after blight took his family's lentils.
hook_or_secret: He heard harvest songs in an empty field just before dawn.

name: Iria Sunmere
origin: From a lake village where ashes are scattered from painted boats.
appearance: Silver-white eyes, dark travel veil, small urn pouch at her heart.
voice: Soft, formal, and tired.
mannerism: Keeps one hand over the urn pouch in crowds.
attitude: Respectful, distant, braver than she looks.
tiny_backstory: She is carrying her husband's ashes to the spring where they first met.
hook_or_secret: She fears the ashes grow heavier whenever she lies about being ready.

name: Thavan Broadfall
origin: From a cliffside goliath work crew that repairs rope bridges after storms.
appearance: Huge hands, storm-gray skin marks, coil of worn bridge rope across his chest.
voice: Quiet, deliberate, with sudden laughter.
mannerism: Checks knots on other people's packs without asking.
attitude: Helpful, embarrassed by thanks.
tiny_backstory: He left after a cousin blamed him for a snapped anchor line.
hook_or_secret: Knows the line snapped because someone cut halfway through it.

name: Rain-on-Tin
origin: From a warm coast caravan where tabaxi swap stories for tiny oddments.
appearance: Spotted tawny fur, bright blue sash, pouch of shells and bent keys.
voice: Purring, quick, and delighted.
mannerism: Tilts her head toward any unfamiliar sound.
attitude: Friendly, restless, allergic to boredom.
tiny_backstory: She travels inland because she wants to hear snow before seeing it.
hook_or_secret: Insists one bent key opens a door that appears only during summer rain.

name: Three-Cart-Rattle
origin: From roadside camps where kenku children learned routes by wheel sounds.
appearance: Dusty black feathers, patched hood, necklace of cracked harness rings.
voice: Mimics wagon wheels, mule curses, and kind old drivers.
mannerism: Counts passing carts by sound before looking.
attitude: Cautious, useful, easily startled by silence.
tiny_backstory: He lost his train in a fog bank and followed the wrong bell for two days.
hook_or_secret: Can mimic the missing lead driver's exact last warning.

name: Oswin Rook
origin: From a border hamlet where old helmets become flower pots.
appearance: Weathered face, limp, plain walking staff carved with names.
voice: Hoarse, courteous, and watchful.
mannerism: Steps around puddles as if avoiding old blood.
attitude: Kind to children, uneasy around drums.
tiny_backstory: He walks shrine to shrine leaving names of friends who never came home.
hook_or_secret: Carries one name he cannot remember, only the shape of the letters.

name: Ragna Ambermug
origin: From a brewery hold that sends dwarven casks along the river roads.
appearance: Amber beads in braided beard, black mourning cap, cask tally board on her pack.
voice: Rough, warm, and businesslike.
mannerism: Smells tavern mugs before drinking.
attitude: Practical, grieving in private.
tiny_backstory: She took over her spouse's delivery route because the taverns still need ale.
hook_or_secret: One village keeps returning full casks without explanation.

name: Nymira Softfall
origin: From a snowline elven village known for mending cloaks with white thread.
appearance: Pale hair braided under a fur cap, needle case on her sleeve, quiet blue eyes.
voice: Soft, steady, and hard to rush.
mannerism: Repairs loose hems during conversations.
attitude: Gentle, observant, slow to complain.
tiny_backstory: She follows winter caravans mending what cold and distance tear apart.
hook_or_secret: Can tell which road a traveler took by the mud caught in their hem.

name: Kessa Reedbank
origin: From a stilt village where children learn safe mud by smell.
appearance: Reed cloak, bare muddy calves, silver fishhook earrings.
voice: Flat, practical, and faintly amused.
mannerism: Sniffs the wind before stepping onto wet ground.
attitude: Direct, protective of fools who admit ignorance.
tiny_backstory: She started guiding after finding two merchants waist-deep in singing mud.
hook_or_secret: Locals say frogs stop croaking when a liar enters the fen.

name: Erevan Mossglade
origin: From an elven canopy hamlet where paths are marked by living moss.
appearance: Green-brown leathers, leaf-litter hair, bow strung with pale cord.
voice: Quiet, dry, and close to a whisper.
mannerism: Touches moss before choosing a direction.
attitude: Patient with respectful travelers, cold to axe carriers.
tiny_backstory: He remembers when the youngest oak on the ridge was planted for his sister.
hook_or_secret: A trail moss has begun growing in perfect circles around empty air.

name: Barend Granitehand
origin: From a cliff mine outpost where dwarves snare snow hares above the shafts.
appearance: Short gray beard, crampon boots, patched hide coat, horn-handled knife.
voice: Gruff, clipped, and echo-aware.
mannerism: Spits pebbles from his boot before every climb.
attitude: Blunt, loyal once paid fairly.
tiny_backstory: He learned heights because tunnels made him feel trapped after a cave-in.
hook_or_secret: Hears knocking in the cliffs on windless mornings.

name: Anakal Snowstride
origin: From a goliath snow camp that moves with the safest avalanche lines.
appearance: Tall, frost-white braids, blue stone markings, snow goggles on her brow.
voice: Low, spare, and carried by the chest.
mannerism: Stamps once to feel snow layers answer.
attitude: Calm, unsentimental, deeply reliable.
tiny_backstory: Her aunt taught her to hear hollow snow after losing a tent to a slide.
hook_or_secret: Says this year's avalanches fall uphill in one cursed ravine.

name: Fenno Bramblefoot
origin: From a halfling greenbelt where every hedge gap has a family nickname.
appearance: Curly hair full of burrs, rabbit-skin vest, tiny snares coiled at his belt.
voice: Merry, nasal, and full of warnings.
mannerism: Names every rabbit as if it owes him money.
attitude: Good-humored, territorial about lanes.
tiny_backstory: He traps small game to keep his grandmother's soup pot full.
hook_or_secret: Claims the blackberry hedge whispers new nicknames before births.

name: Ghoruk Pinejaw
origin: From a pine barrens lodge where orc families smoke meat in long winter pits.
appearance: Dark green skin, pine pitch in braids, boar-tusk necklace.
voice: Rough, cheerful, and loud outdoors.
mannerism: Clicks his tusks before giving bad news.
attitude: Bold, hospitable, easily bored in towns.
tiny_backstory: He took up boar hunting after one ruined his mother's root cellar.
hook_or_secret: A huge white boar keeps sparing his traps and stealing only turnips.

name: Thava Kepeshkmolik
origin: From a blue-scaled dragonborn clan that camps where dry riverbeds remember rain.
appearance: Blue scales dulled by sand, white headwrap, hooked staff carved with flood marks.
voice: Crackling, dry, and exact.
mannerism: Draws water lines in dust while explaining routes.
attitude: Stern about waterskins, generous with shade.
tiny_backstory: She survived a flash flood by climbing a dead acacia as a child.
hook_or_secret: Knows one wash that fills with cold mist before distant rain.

name: Sable Briarhorn
origin: From a damp hollow where tiefling families sell glowcaps before dawn.
appearance: Charcoal skin, ramlike horns mossed at the tips, basket lined with black leaves.
voice: Low, playful, and secretive.
mannerism: Shields his eyes from moonlight more than sun.
attitude: Friendly if not followed.
tiny_backstory: He learned fungi from an aunt who could price mushrooms by smell alone.
hook_or_secret: Some glowcaps blink in sequence near the old charcoal pits.

name: Lilli Thistlewhistle
origin: From a meadow burrowstead where gnomes map tunnels by badger patience.
appearance: Tiny green cloak, dandelion-yellow hair, mud-splashed survey strings.
voice: High, precise, and delighted by dirt.
mannerism: Whistles softly before entering any burrow.
attitude: Curious, fearless underground, nervous in boats.
tiny_backstory: She began mapping after a prize goat fell through a hidden roof tunnel.
hook_or_secret: One badger set connects to a cellar no farm admits owning.

name: Tavian Dawnridge
origin: From a chain of sheep hills where beacon fires warn of storms and strays.
appearance: Bronze skin with a dawn glow, wool cloak, soot lines across his cheeks.
voice: Clear, carrying, and calm.
mannerism: Checks the horizon after every sentence.
attitude: Gentle, watchful, quietly lonely.
tiny_backstory: He inherited the beacon hut after his father chose the sea and never returned.
hook_or_secret: His fire burns pale whenever a lamb is born under thunder.

name: Perrin Ashwood
origin: From a coppice village where every family has a charcoal ring in the woods.
appearance: Sooty beard, brown hood, axe scar across one thumb.
voice: Soft, smoky, and cautious.
mannerism: Rubs charcoal between his fingers while thinking.
attitude: Quietly helpful, dislikes noble hunters.
tiny_backstory: He knows the woods by which charcoal pits still hold heat after rain.
hook_or_secret: A new charcoal ring appeared last week, but no one in the village made it.

name: Sylmarel Fernsong
origin: From a fern-shadowed elven camp that follows the old does in spring.
appearance: Copper-brown skin, fern crown, soft boots dyed with leaf stain.
voice: Quiet, warm, and rhythmical.
mannerism: Pauses when birds stop calling.
attitude: Kind, alert, intolerant of waste.
tiny_backstory: She learned every deer path while searching for a lost little brother.
hook_or_secret: One path is now avoided by deer but followed by butterflies.

name: Morga Flintbraid
origin: From a dwarven hillhold where spring rights settle marriages and feuds.
appearance: Flint-gray braid, lamp hook on belt, palms white with mineral dust.
voice: Dry, blunt, and reassuring.
mannerism: Listens to stone with one ear pressed flat.
attitude: Practical, patient with thirst, not with panic.
tiny_backstory: She saved her hold during a drought by finding a drip behind old plaster.
hook_or_secret: A trusted spring tastes faintly of copper only after midnight.

name: Sova Highplume
origin: From the cliff eyries above White Gull Pass, where aarakocra families mark the year by eagle fledging.
appearance: Bronze feathers, wind-notched crest, feather charms tied to one travel harness.
voice: Bright, wind-cut, and full of sky metaphors.
mannerism: Shades his eyes even underground and checks rafters before doorways.
attitude: Open-hearted, proud, and uneasy under low ceilings.
tiny_backstory: He learned patience counting hatch days beside his grandmother on a ledge above the clouds.
hook_or_secret: This year the eagles built with strips of dyed funeral cloth from a valley below.

name: Marigold Nettlewhip
origin: From a halfling vale where berry rights pass through aunties, not deeds.
appearance: Wide straw hat, purple-stained lips, apron reinforced with thorn leather.
voice: Sweet, sharp, and full of local names.
mannerism: Smacks reaching hands with a willow switch.
attitude: Welcoming after rules are understood.
tiny_backstory: She supports five cousins by knowing which berries ripen first after frost.
hook_or_secret: One forbidden patch makes pies that reveal family grudges at dinner.

name: Argha Reedscar
origin: From an orc reed village where fish runs decide wedding dates.
appearance: Green-brown skin, scar across one cheek, reed-wrapped spear, wet braids.
voice: Low, teasing, and patient.
mannerism: Watches reflections instead of faces.
attitude: Relaxed until someone wastes fish.
tiny_backstory: She learned spear fishing to impress a girl who married a potter instead.
hook_or_secret: The salmon are arriving with tiny black stones in their mouths.

name: Medrash Clethtinthiallor
origin: From a green-scaled dragonborn family that harvests reed resin by firefly light.
appearance: Emerald scales, dark reed cloak, lantern hood painted with wing patterns.
voice: Hissing, patient, and musical at night.
mannerism: Counts firefly blinks against his claws.
attitude: Gentle, secretive about family routes.
tiny_backstory: His mother taught him which lights mean insects and which mean deep water.
hook_or_secret: A new blue blink pattern leads toward abandoned peat huts.

name: Virelle Thornash
origin: From a pine village rebuilt after wildfire, where tiefling families know new growth.
appearance: Russet skin, short black horns, ash-gray cloak, seed pouches across her chest.
voice: Smoky, practical, and wry.
mannerism: Touches each sprout with two careful fingers.
attitude: Protective of regrowing land.
tiny_backstory: She was a child when the fire came and remembers which trees saved the road.
hook_or_secret: Fresh grass grows overnight around one untouched black stump.

name: Perris Bumblewick
origin: From a gnome apiary hollow where hive gossip is treated as weather news.
appearance: Honey-colored beard, veiled hat, gloves patched with tiny flower prints.
voice: Buzzing, gentle, and fretful.
mannerism: Whispers apologies to bees before opening hives.
attitude: Nervous but generous with honey.
tiny_backstory: He inherited three difficult hives and a reputation for surviving stings.
hook_or_secret: His bees spell one neighbor's name in wax comb again and again.

name: Maelin Starling
origin: From a moor chapel where pale-eyed children learn the safe stars first.
appearance: Cool brown skin, star-bright eyes, dark oilskin cloak, hooded lantern.
voice: Quiet, clear, and steady after sunset.
mannerism: Covers one eye before checking the stars.
attitude: Careful, compassionate, refuses reckless shortcuts.
tiny_backstory: She guides moor crossings after her older sister vanished in white mist.
hook_or_secret: One star she follows has been lower every night this month.

name: Bramble-of-the-North-Fen
origin: From a firbolg reed circle that settles disputes by listening through peat.
appearance: Tall, broad, gray-lilac skin, mossy beard, cloak of stitched sedge.
voice: Deep, slow, and kind as rain.
mannerism: Asks permission of the ground before digging.
attitude: Gentle, immovable about respect.
tiny_backstory: He watches the bog because his grandmother said it remembers every heavy step.
hook_or_secret: Knows which peat pools repeat voices from arguments held years ago.

name: Cloud-Over-Clover
origin: From a tabaxi prairie caravan that follows grasshoppers and rain shadows.
appearance: Cream fur with brown spots, grass cloak, bead cord tied to her tail.
voice: Soft, quick, and full of sudden laughter.
mannerism: Freezes completely when hawks pass overhead.
attitude: Playful, watchful, impatient with fences.
tiny_backstory: She scouts grazing land for cousins whose ponies are growing thin.
hook_or_secret: The grasshoppers are all jumping west, even against the wind.

name: Two-Owl-Cry
origin: From wind-cut ridges where kenku families navigate by echo and owl calls.
appearance: Charcoal feathers, pale cloak, talons wrapped for silent stone.
voice: Layered owl calls, boot scrapes, and borrowed campfire murmurs.
mannerism: Tilts his head until distant echoes line up.
attitude: Skittish, accurate, proud when believed.
tiny_backstory: He found lost goats by copying the echo of their bells through fog.
hook_or_secret: Can repeat a stranger's cough heard from inside a sealed ravine.

name: Rowena Brack
origin: From a tide hamlet where families read moon tables on smokehouse doors.
appearance: Wind-burned skin, oilskin sleeves, eel spear and net slung over one shoulder.
voice: Sharp, briny, and impatient.
mannerism: Checks the moon even at noon.
attitude: Suspicious of inlanders, fair with children.
tiny_backstory: She took over the eel traps when her father lost three fingers to frostbite.
hook_or_secret: The tide came in warm last night, and the old women will not discuss it.

name: Skalf Deepmoss
origin: From a dwarven cavern farm where lichen colors mark feast days.
appearance: Pale beard with green streaks, hooded lamp, satchel of damp clay boxes.
voice: Murmuring, patient, and dry as old stone.
mannerism: Never speaks louder than a drip underground.
attitude: Calm, fussy about clean boots.
tiny_backstory: He learned rare lichen routes from a mother who could taste minerals in dust.
hook_or_secret: A blue lichen patch now grows in the shape of a door latch.

name: Mara Venn
origin: Raised among lockhouses where Human families trade night-watch shifts for warm soup.
appearance: Broad hands, rolled sleeves, river-mud boots, and a rope burn that never quite fades.
voice: Low, practical, and timed to the creak of towlines.
mannerism: Knots loose threads around one finger while thinking.
attitude: Helpful if paid fairly, sharp with anyone who mocks river work.
tiny_backstory: She learned currents before letters and still counts distance by bridges, not miles.
hook_or_secret: Keeps a locked tin of unpaid ferryman tokens from people who vanished mid-crossing.

name: Bromli Ironbarrow
origin: A hill Dwarf from a quarry town that ships lintels, millstones, and stubborn opinions.
appearance: Squared beard rings, patched knee pads, and a carrying frame polished by years of use.
voice: Gruff, precise, and fond of weight estimates.
mannerism: Taps cargo twice before lifting it.
attitude: Respectful toward craft, suspicious of shortcuts.
tiny_backstory: Bromli left the quarry after a cave-in made silence feel too heavy underground.
hook_or_secret: Can identify one smuggled relic by the stone dust trapped in its cracks.

name: Saelira Moonwake
origin: An Elf from a pine-covered cove where nets are sung dry under moonlight.
appearance: Sea-glass earrings, silver hair tied with sail thread, and tar freckles on fine fingers.
voice: Soft and lilting, with sudden sailor profanity when a stitch breaks.
mannerism: Hums the name of each wind as she works.
attitude: Patient with novices, chilly toward captains who underpay crews.
tiny_backstory: She repairs sails because her first voyage ended with canvas tearing like thunder.
hook_or_secret: Has stitched coded star charts into three merchant sails.

name: Nadarr Prexijandilin
origin: A brass Dragonborn from a sun-baked caravanserai that measures honor in shared canteens.
appearance: Dull-gold scales, linen neck wraps, and a spear etched with tally marks for saved travelers.
voice: Dry, resonant, and unexpectedly gentle around frightened animals.
mannerism: Tests water skins by scent before anyone drinks.
attitude: Disciplined, generous with water, merciless with thieves.
tiny_backstory: Nadarr was adopted by drovers after being found beside a cracked cistern.
hook_or_secret: Knows which oasis stones hide a forgotten debt ledger.

name: Tessa Underbough
origin: A Halfling from orchard country where every family owns a stew pot and a road song.
appearance: Apron pockets full of spice twists, curly brown hair, and bare feet tough as boot leather.
voice: Bright, quick, and impossible to ignore at breakfast.
mannerism: Counts people by ladle portions instead of names.
attitude: Warm until someone wastes food or frightens the ponies.
tiny_backstory: She joined caravans to find the soldier who returned her mother's pie plate with a thank-you note.
hook_or_secret: Her spice box hides a list of bandit camps marked as berry patches.

name: Gharuk Stonewake
origin: An Orc from a foggy fishing quarter where strength is shared before it is praised.
appearance: One tusk capped in brass, salt-stiff braids, and shoulders marked by old harness straps.
voice: Blunt, warm, and loud enough to cut through gull cries.
mannerism: Balances coins on his capped tusk when bargaining.
attitude: Good-natured but allergic to dockside bullies.
tiny_backstory: Gharuk once carried an injured rival home and earned a lifetime of awkward respect.
hook_or_secret: He overheard a customs officer selling inspection seals after midnight.

name: Nerissa Vale
origin: A Tiefling from lantern marshes where horn shadows are considered lucky on the water.
appearance: Deep red skin, swept black horns, a waterproof cloak, and a silver bell tied to one wrist.
voice: Smooth and amused, with careful pauses before bad news.
mannerism: Rings her wrist bell once before pushing from shore.
attitude: Courteous, watchful, and willing to ferry desperate people on credit.
tiny_backstory: Nerissa took the night route after daylight passengers kept asking foolish questions about her tail.
hook_or_secret: Her ferry has carried the same silent passenger every new moon for seven years.

name: Pimble Nacklewhistle
origin: A rock Gnome from a wheelwright lane where children learn axle grease before arithmetic.
appearance: Copper goggles, singed eyebrows, and tiny measuring sticks tucked into every cuff.
voice: Fast, nasal, and delighted by mechanical failure.
mannerism: Names every wheel that survives a bad road.
attitude: Cheerful, nosy, and impossible to discourage.
tiny_backstory: Pimble joined the road to test a collapsible spare axle no one asked for.
hook_or_secret: His harmless-looking axle gauge can open a noble's travel strongbox.

name: Kava Thundermark
origin: A Goliath from high sheep trails where storms are read like family moods.
appearance: Pale gray skin, white tattoos like lightning forks, and a pack nearly as tall as a door.
voice: Calm, spacious, and never raised in a storm.
mannerism: Presses two fingers to the ground before choosing a path.
attitude: Steady and kind to the exhausted, impatient with boasting.
tiny_backstory: Kava carries goods over the pass to keep her younger cousins from leaving home hungry.
hook_or_secret: She knows a sheltered ledge where someone recently carved fresh warning marks.

name: Erian Solace
origin: An Aasimar from a shrine village where dawn bells double as caravan departures.
appearance: Warm brown skin, faintly luminous eyes, a straw hat, and patched gloves smelling of oats.
voice: Even, reassuring, and tired in a familiar way.
mannerism: Apologizes to mules before tightening any strap.
attitude: Gentle, reliable, and firm about rest stops.
tiny_backstory: Erian chose mule work after deciding small mercies mattered more than sermons.
hook_or_secret: His oldest mule refuses roads where graves have been disturbed.

name: Darik Pell
origin: A Human from the old granary ward, raised between ledgers, grain dust, and shouting dock crews.
appearance: Ink-stained cuffs, narrow spectacles, and a dock knife he clearly hates needing.
voice: Clipped, anxious, and exact with dates.
mannerism: Rewrites numbers in the air before speaking them.
attitude: Nervous but honest when given room to breathe.
tiny_backstory: Darik took clerking after a bad leg ended his dream of deep-water sailing.
hook_or_secret: He noticed one impossible shipment listed as both flour and funerary ash.

name: Theren Ashbark
origin: A wood Elf from upriver cedar groves where raft paths are inherited like songs.
appearance: Green eyes, bark-brown braids, and wrists wrapped in river reed charms.
voice: Dry, melodic, and faintly mocking when city folk discuss currents.
mannerism: Chews cedar splinters when impatient.
attitude: Proud of his river knowledge, generous to anyone who listens.
tiny_backstory: Theren pilots timber because his clan's oldest grove must pay its winter taxes somehow.
hook_or_secret: He found a sealed bone tube lodged inside a supposedly ordinary log.

name: Hilda Copperkeg
origin: A mountain Dwarf from a brewery clan that ships casks farther than most kings send letters.
appearance: Braided auburn beard, blue wagon coat, and boots darkened by spilled ale.
voice: Booming, merry, and deadly serious about inventory.
mannerism: Sniffs cask bungs before trusting a delivery note.
attitude: Loudly friendly until someone waters beer.
tiny_backstory: Hilda can still name every tavern that refused her grandmother a fair price.
hook_or_secret: One cask in her wagon sloshes with coins instead of ale.

name: Biri Delmirev
origin: A blue Dragonborn from a cliffside beacon town where children learn flag codes by sunrise.
appearance: Azure scales, short ivory horns, and a messenger satchel patched with signal colors.
voice: Crisp, ringing, and breathless only after truly absurd stairs.
mannerism: Arranges cups and knives into flag patterns during meals.
attitude: Alert, competitive, and loyal to dock crews who trust her signals.
tiny_backstory: Biri took running work to pay off fines from racing beacon lights for sport.
hook_or_secret: She delivered a false storm warning once and still searches for who forged it.

name: Mazra Hullscar
origin: An Orc from a shipyard district where every family knows the smell of pitch and rain.
appearance: Green skin flecked with tar, cropped hair, and forearms corded from mallet work.
voice: Raspy, amused, and full of shipwright slang.
mannerism: Tests a plank seam with her thumb even on furniture.
attitude: Blunt but fair, protective of apprentices.
tiny_backstory: Mazra learned caulking from an aunt who said a quiet leak kills louder than a blade.
hook_or_secret: She found tooth marks inside a hull where no creature should have fit.

name: Berrin Tealeaf
origin: A Halfling from a hill market where speed matters more than height and gossip rides every cart.
appearance: Sun-browned cheeks, a green cap with bent feather, and calves like coiled rope.
voice: Quick, cheerful, and always mid-bargain.
mannerism: Marks turns with little crumbs for his own memory.
attitude: Friendly, opportunistic, and allergic to boredom.
tiny_backstory: Berrin learned every alley after delivering medicine through a flood in a stolen handcart.
hook_or_secret: He can lead anyone through the market without crossing a guard's sightline.

name: Lilli Fizzlebend
origin: A forest Gnome from a mossy lockkeeper cottage where hinges are treated like housepets.
appearance: Freckled nose, moss-green scarf, tiny oil cans, and a braid full of brass pins.
voice: Whispery until machinery misbehaves, then thunderous.
mannerism: Clicks her tongue in different rhythms for different gears.
attitude: Curious, kind, and fiercely defensive of old locks.
tiny_backstory: Lilli inherited the lock after convincing a floodgate to behave during spring melt.
hook_or_secret: One canal gate opens only when she speaks the name carved under its handle.

name: Casrian Dusk
origin: A Tiefling from the winter quay, where steam from breath and horns fills every dawn auction.
appearance: Violet skin, swept pale horns, frost-cracked gloves, and a coat lined with fishhooks.
voice: Quiet, sardonic, and always slightly hoarse from cold air.
mannerism: Flicks his tail away from puddles with practiced dignity.
attitude: Reserved but generous with people who work early hours.
tiny_backstory: Casrian supports three younger cousins by carrying fish before the city wakes.
hook_or_secret: He saw a crate of fresh sea fish arrive from a landlocked monastery.

name: Rukan Flintstride
origin: A Goliath from cliff hamlets who came downriver to haul bridge chains and toll coffers.
appearance: Slate skin, shaved head, heavy chain belt, and a smile that arrives slowly.
voice: Deep, careful, and honest enough to annoy smugglers.
mannerism: Rolls shoulder joints before answering questions.
attitude: Fair-minded, stubborn, and quietly lonely in crowds.
tiny_backstory: Rukan sends most wages home after a rockslide took his family's winter stores.
hook_or_secret: He knows which toll weights were hollowed to hide tiny scrolls.

name: Seren Valebright
origin: An Aasimar from a rainwashed infirmary district where lanterns stay lit for late wagons.
appearance: Bronze skin, faint gold freckles, gray carter's cloak, and neat bundles of clean linen.
voice: Clear, calm, and practiced at lowering panic.
mannerism: Touches each crate label as if blessing the contents.
attitude: Compassionate, brisk, and intolerant of profiteers.
tiny_backstory: Seren began hauling supplies after fever took her brother and left the ward empty of bandages.
hook_or_secret: Her route includes one shuttered clinic that still receives fresh medicine by night.

name: Mist-on-Rope
origin: A Tabaxi from warm trade islands where every child races gulls across mast ropes.
appearance: Smoke-gray fur, bright amber eyes, and a vest sewn with spare pulley pins.
voice: Purring, teasing, and suddenly serious aloft.
mannerism: Tests knots with both hands and tail before trusting them.
attitude: Playful on deck, exacting in rigging.
tiny_backstory: Mist-on-Rope took foreign ships after her home port grew too small for her curiosity.
hook_or_secret: She once saw a second shadow climbing beside her with no body attached.

name: Clink
origin: A Kenku from a bellfounders' alley who learned work orders by echoing foremen perfectly.
appearance: Glossy black feathers, a chipped brass bell, and chalk dust around his claws.
voice: Speaks in borrowed dock calls, lullabies, and coin clinks.
mannerism: Repeats the last useful sound before making a decision.
attitude: Eager, observant, and proud when understood.
tiny_backstory: Clink became a caller after saving a worker from a falling crate by mimicking a warning bell.
hook_or_secret: He can reproduce the voice that ordered a sealed warehouse opened.

name: Oline Strake
origin: A Human from inland salt flats where carts groan white by noon and sing by dusk.
appearance: Wind-chapped skin, white salt streaks in dark hair, and a whip she uses mostly as a pointer.
voice: Hoarse, dry, and full of practical jokes.
mannerism: Licks a finger to test dust before naming the road ahead.
attitude: Resilient, funny, and slow to trust rich passengers.
tiny_backstory: Oline inherited her team after her father lost the family cart in a card game and won it back with a song.
hook_or_secret: Her lead ox refuses to pass one salt mound that moves slightly each month.

name: Kargan Deepdelve
origin: A Dwarf from a flooded mine town that now ships ore by canal instead of rail.
appearance: Black beard braided with iron beads, waterproof ledger case, and sleeves rolled above scarred wrists.
voice: Measured, gravelly, and allergic to vague quantities.
mannerism: Bites the end of his quill when angry.
attitude: Exacting but fair to crews who keep honest counts.
tiny_backstory: Kargan learned quartermaster work after floodwater swallowed his first pickaxe.
hook_or_secret: His manifest lists one ore crate that weighs less every time it is moved.

name: Ilyana Starling
origin: An Elf from open grasslands where horse names are kept in family memory for generations.
appearance: Chestnut hair, green riding coat, and thin scars from reins across elegant fingers.
voice: Clear, firm, and soothing when animals panic.
mannerism: Clicks her tongue once for truth, twice for warning.
attitude: Graceful, tired, and more loyal to horses than nobles.
tiny_backstory: Ilyana took caravan work to buy back a mare sold during a winter debt.
hook_or_secret: One of her horses keeps returning with grave dirt packed into its shoes.

name: Jonas Reed
origin: A Human cooper's son from a brewery lane where old cellars connect more than barrels.
appearance: Plain brown vest, nervous eyes, and chalk crescents hidden under his cuffs.
voice: Mild, apologetic, and too rehearsed when denying things.
mannerism: Smells every candle before lighting it.
attitude: Friendly but frightened of being ordinary.
tiny_backstory: Jonas joined a basement circle after they praised his careful hands for the first time.
hook_or_secret: He believes the ritual is only meant to bless spoiled beer, not awaken anything.

name: Vexa Mourn
origin: A Tiefling from a funeral market where black cloth, incense, and gossip keep families fed.
appearance: Blue-gray skin, curled ivory horns, and fingertips darkened by mourning dye.
voice: Velvet-soft, practical, and sharp on the price of grief.
mannerism: Pins veils with exactly seven careful taps.
attitude: Tender with the bereaved, cool toward priests.
tiny_backstory: Vexa found comfort in a secret society that promised the dead still hear good tailoring.
hook_or_secret: She sews names of the recently dead into veils before anyone tells her them.

name: Eldeth Cindervein
origin: A Dwarf from a smelter quarter where soot coats saints and sinners equally.
appearance: Coal-black beard braids, red-rimmed eyes, and a prayer apron patched with burn holes.
voice: Rough, reverent, and dry as furnace ash.
mannerism: Draws tiny doors in ash with her thumb.
attitude: Severe but feeds anyone who looks cold.
tiny_backstory: Eldeth began tending the chapel after the foundry accident that took her wife.
hook_or_secret: She is convinced the ash patterns answer questions if no one speaks before dawn.

name: Vaelion Duskleaf
origin: An Elf from an abandoned orchard where old harvest songs still draw listeners at dusk.
appearance: Copper hair, green-black robes cut like work clothes, and apple seeds kept in glass beads.
voice: Gentle, musical, and impossible to interrupt politely.
mannerism: Plants seeds in cracks while speaking.
attitude: Patient, persuasive, and quietly disappointed in cities.
tiny_backstory: Vaelion joined the hymn circle after a blight spared only the trees he sang beside.
hook_or_secret: His prettiest song makes listeners remember a childhood that was never theirs.

name: Nala Kimbatuul
origin: A silver Dragonborn from a cold monastery town where breath fog and candle smoke mingle.
appearance: Bright silver scales, cracked horn tips, and wax drips carefully layered on her sleeves.
voice: Clear, icy, and full of numbered certainties.
mannerism: Corrects every candle flame until all heights match.
attitude: Polite, intense, and certain disorder is a moral wound.
tiny_backstory: Nala found peace in a sect that promised the world could be counted back into balance.
hook_or_secret: She can predict small accidents by counting which flame gutters first.

name: Oswin Goodbarrel
origin: A Halfling from a mill village where every scandal starts as a covered dish.
appearance: Round face, flour on his sleeves, and a red waistcoat with a hidden black lining.
voice: Warm, bustling, and strangely solemn during toasts.
mannerism: Cuts bread into symbols before serving guests.
attitude: Hospitable, nosy, and convinced secrecy improves digestion.
tiny_backstory: Oswin inherited a supper club that turned out to be older and stranger than his recipe book.
hook_or_secret: The last slice of every loaf is left for an unseen guest who sometimes pays.

name: Shura Redtusk
origin: An Orc from a border fort where broken treaties are remembered on skin and stone.
appearance: Green skin, one red-painted tusk, and old oath scars crossing both forearms.
voice: Hoarse, compelling, and tender when naming the betrayed.
mannerism: Presses her thumb into scars before making promises.
attitude: Fierce, protective, and suspicious of clean-handed leaders.
tiny_backstory: Shura's secret faith began as a memorial circle for soldiers no one buried properly.
hook_or_secret: Her sermons are starting to name living traitors she has never met.

name: Nessa Cogblossom
origin: A Gnome from a clockmakers' row where every hour has its own superstition.
appearance: Pink spectacles, silver hair in springy knots, and tiny clock hands sewn to her collar.
voice: Bright, rapid, and reverent toward ticking.
mannerism: Winds invisible keys behind her ears.
attitude: Helpful, distractible, and convinced lateness has teeth.
tiny_backstory: Nessa joined a timekeeping sect after a broken watch restarted at the moment her mother recovered.
hook_or_secret: Her pocket shrine ticks backward near anyone who has broken a vow.

name: Mavuk Skygraven
origin: A Goliath from a wind-cut ridge where silence is treated as a shelter, not an absence.
appearance: White stone-like skin, blue facial tattoos, and wool wrappings muffling every step.
voice: Rare, quiet, and startlingly warm.
mannerism: Answers hard questions by placing a stone between speaker and listener.
attitude: Peaceful, wary of noise, and patient beyond comfort.
tiny_backstory: Mavuk swore himself to silence after an avalanche punished one reckless shout.
hook_or_secret: He carries a stone that vibrates whenever someone nearby lies aloud.

name: Liora Dawnhush
origin: An Aasimar from a cathedral school that mistook her quiet glow for obedience.
appearance: Soft gold eyes, plain choir robe, and a throat ribbon embroidered with tiny closed eyes.
voice: Pure, restrained, and trembles only after songs end.
mannerism: Touches her throat before telling a necessary lie.
attitude: Kind, conflicted, and frightened of disappointing everyone.
tiny_backstory: Liora joined a hidden choir that promised songs for people ignored by official prayers.
hook_or_secret: One hymn in her book leaves no echo, even in stone halls.

name: Pella Wren
origin: A Human washerwoman from a crowded tenement court where secrets soak out with blood and wine.
appearance: Strong arms, damp kerchief, and blue soap marks that form careful little signs.
voice: Flat, funny, and impossible to shock.
mannerism: Wringing cloth while asking questions.
attitude: Practical, protective of neighbors, and dismissive of noble virtue.
tiny_backstory: Pella found a sisterhood using laundry marks to warn servants about dangerous households.
hook_or_secret: Some marks are no longer made by living hands, but they are still accurate.

name: Dain Lockhammer
origin: A Dwarf locksmith from an undercity stair where every door has a family story.
appearance: Gray beard in square plaits, heavy key rings, and a left eye clouded by metal filings.
voice: Low, certain, and fond of old proverbs about hinges.
mannerism: Listens to doors before knocking.
attitude: Courteous, stubborn, and more afraid of openness than darkness.
tiny_backstory: Dain joined a sect that teaches some doors save lives by staying shut.
hook_or_secret: He guards a key to a door he has sworn never to locate.

name: Maerith Willowshade
origin: An Elf from a lakeside grove where reflections are consulted before elders.
appearance: Dark green cloak, pale braided hair, and water stains shaped like leaves along her hem.
voice: Serene, distant, and clearer when she looks away.
mannerism: Speaks to reflections half a breath before people.
attitude: Gracious, evasive, and sincerely lonely.
tiny_backstory: Maerith began tending the moonwell after seeing her dead sister smile from its surface.
hook_or_secret: The reflection that advises her has started arriving before she does.

name: Shamash Ophinshtalajiir
origin: A red Dragonborn from a forge-town where bells are cast for births, fires, and debts.
appearance: Crimson scales dulled by soot, broken horn banded in iron, and a bell-clapper pendant.
voice: Smoky, repentant, and unexpectedly poetic.
mannerism: Flinches at bells, then smiles as if forgiven.
attitude: Humble, intense, and desperate to make amends.
tiny_backstory: Shamash joined the penitents after a fire he set by accident took a row of homes.
hook_or_secret: He hears one bell no one else hears, and it tolls before arson.

name: Mira Puddlewick
origin: A Halfling from marsh farms where rainwater is saved with more care than coin.
appearance: Brown curls, patched yellow shawl, and damp fingertips stained with berry ink.
voice: Sweet, matter-of-fact, and oddly cheerful about bad omens.
mannerism: Drops pebbles into cups to decide which way to walk.
attitude: Kind, superstitious, and impossible to hurry.
tiny_backstory: Mira joined a rain circle after predicting a drought from ripples in a pig trough.
hook_or_secret: Her barrels collect whispers during storms and repeat them at noon.

name: Borag Flintjaw
origin: An Orc from limestone pits where work songs keep hammers striking together.
appearance: Dusty green skin, chipped tusks, and a limestone handprint across his chest.
voice: Powerful, rhythmic, and soft when speaking to children.
mannerism: Keeps time by tapping his tusk with a chisel.
attitude: Community-minded, blunt, and devout without cruelty.
tiny_backstory: Borag's chant circle began as a way to keep quarry workers awake during dangerous shifts.
hook_or_secret: The chant changed on its own last week and opened a seam in the quarry wall.

name: Fenwick Bristlecap
origin: A Gnome from damp brewery tunnels where mushrooms are named, traded, and occasionally obeyed.
appearance: Wild white hair, purple-stained teeth, and a waistcoat smelling of loam.
voice: Whispery, excited, and full of botanical gossip.
mannerism: Asks mushrooms for permission before sitting.
attitude: Sweet, unsettling, and very hard to offend.
tiny_backstory: Fenwick joined the cellar fellowship after a rare cap grew in the shape of his lost dog.
hook_or_secret: His favorite mushroom repeats overheard conversations in the voices of the absent.

name: Sareth Nocturne
origin: A Tiefling from a print-shop alley where rumors dry faster than ink.
appearance: Charcoal skin, swept red horns, and fingers permanently stained midnight blue.
voice: Quick, elegant, and venomous toward censors.
mannerism: Folds paper into tiny masks while arguing.
attitude: Rebellious, witty, and more idealistic than he admits.
tiny_backstory: Sareth joined a secret press after his father's obituary was edited into a lie.
hook_or_secret: One anonymous pamphlet he printed predicts arrests before warrants are written.

name: Calen Brightfall
origin: An Aasimar from a roadside hospice where travelers arrive with prayers and leave with receipts.
appearance: Dim silver eyes, clean bandages at both wrists, and a travel cloak worn shiny at the shoulders.
voice: Earnest, cracked, and almost pleading.
mannerism: Counts heartbeats by touching his own pulse.
attitude: Compassionate, ashamed, and too willing to believe.
tiny_backstory: Calen joined a hidden mercy cult after failing to save a child everyone expected him to heal.
hook_or_secret: He knows the cult's gentle rituals are becoming hungrier, but not how to stop them.

name: Tavri Hailstone
origin: A Goliath from glacier trails where the dead are stacked in cairns safe from spring floods.
appearance: Blue-gray skin, white lashes, and a mantle of stitched winter tokens.
voice: Slow, solemn, and tender when naming the lost.
mannerism: Adds a pebble to her pouch after every meaningful conversation.
attitude: Protective, melancholy, and wary of laughter near graves.
tiny_backstory: Tavri found faith in a cairn circle that remembers names no village records kept.
hook_or_secret: One cairn keeps gaining stones shaped like teeth.

name: Soft Knell
origin: A Kenku from a ruined bell tower where echoes taught her more prayers than priests did.
appearance: Dusky feathers, a gray novice robe, and shell beads that click like distant bells.
voice: Borrowed whispers, old hymns, and perfect imitations of closing doors.
mannerism: Repeats a person's last word in the voice of someone they miss.
attitude: Shy, observant, and devout in a practical way.
tiny_backstory: Soft Knell joined the echo chapel because it never mocked her borrowed speech.
hook_or_secret: She can repeat a confession spoken years before in the same room.

name: Edrin Moss
origin: A Human from a cemetery cottage where vegetables grow fat between old family plots.
appearance: Mud-dark boots, seed packets in his vest, and a smile that arrives late.
voice: Hushed, kindly, and full of gardening advice.
mannerism: Speaks to weeds as if correcting children.
attitude: Gentle, secretive, and irritated by dramatic mourners.
tiny_backstory: Edrin joined a grave-garden fellowship because it fed widows before it asked questions.
hook_or_secret: He plants one black bean on every grave that is not truly occupied.

name: Arieth Silverskein
origin: An Elf from a cloth hall where old tapestries are repaired instead of replaced.
appearance: Silver eyes, ink-black hair, and thread cuts like red rings around both thumbs.
voice: Soft, precise, and unnervingly certain about patterns.
mannerism: Plucks invisible threads from conversations.
attitude: Gracious, distant, and quietly overworked.
tiny_backstory: Arieth joined the loom circle after a tapestry revealed her brother's shipwreck before the news arrived.
hook_or_secret: Her latest weaving shows one party member standing where the sun should be.

name: Tarhun Kerrhylon
origin: A bronze Dragonborn from tide caves where families mark doors with salt against bad dreams.
appearance: Bronze-green scales, weathered cloak, and salt crystals caught along his brow plates.
voice: Deep, patient, and dangerous when interrupted.
mannerism: Draws a salt line before difficult talks.
attitude: Protective, stern, and convinced fear needs boundaries.
tiny_backstory: Tarhun guards the salt circle because his little sister slept peacefully only within its marks.
hook_or_secret: He knows the circle protects against one member of the cult, not outsiders.

name: Rosie Bramblepot
origin: A Halfling from a traveling fair where every booth hides a ledger and every ledger hides a joke.
appearance: Rosy cheeks, ink-smudged dimples, and a flowered bonnet pinned with black ribbon.
voice: Bubbly, exact, and delighted by terrible arithmetic.
mannerism: Adds up bad news on her fingers.
attitude: Upbeat, secretive, and genuinely fond of everyone she warns.
tiny_backstory: Rosie joined the doom ledger because someone had to make the end of things tidy.
hook_or_secret: Her ledger predicts tiny endings: friendships, debts, fevers, and once a kingdom's tax office.

name: Anya Thistle
origin: A Human from a hill town where broken umbrellas are blamed for most weather.
appearance: Gray coat, clever brown eyes, and umbrella ribs tucked through her belt like tools.
voice: Dry, neighborly, and always one storm ahead.
mannerism: Sniffs the air before answering simple questions.
attitude: Practical, amused, and impatient with dramatic wizards.
