tiny_backstory: Anya discovered her knack after fixing an umbrella that opened inside-out into summer.
hook_or_secret: Every umbrella she repairs sheds rain from the day its owner will die.

name: Letharion Quillfall
origin: An Elf from a wandering archive that trades directions for well-remembered dreams.
appearance: Long ink-blue hair, pale traveling robes, and maps folded into his sleeves.
voice: Elegant, distracted, and always misplacing verbs.
mannerism: Draws coastlines on tables with spilled tea.
attitude: Polite, dreamy, and useful when lost.
tiny_backstory: Letharion once mapped a road so accurately it became embarrassed and moved.
hook_or_secret: His newest map shows a town that remembers the party before they arrive.

name: Sigrun Emberpocket
origin: A Dwarf from an extinct mining camp where the last family hearth was carried away in a kettle.
appearance: Copper beard beads, smoke-scented cloak, and a black kettle glowing faintly at the seams.
voice: Warm, gravelly, and bossy about sitting near heat.
mannerism: Feeds tiny crumbs to the kettle before cooking.
attitude: Hospitable, wary, and deeply offended by cold soup.
tiny_backstory: Sigrun inherited the hearth kettle from a grandmother who refused to let home stay in one place.
hook_or_secret: Anyone who sleeps near her kettle dreams of the room they most need to return to.

name: Mordai Whistlewick
origin: A Tiefling from a storm drain district where lost things bob up with apologies attached.
appearance: Rose-red skin, little black horns, and dozens of corked bottles hanging from twine loops.
voice: Merry, reedy, and oddly formal with strangers' secrets.
mannerism: Holds bottles to his ear like shells.
attitude: Cheerful, nosy, and surprisingly discreet.
tiny_backstory: Mordai began collecting bottle notes after one warned him not to marry a woman he had not met yet.
hook_or_secret: One sealed bottle contains a fresh note in a party member's handwriting.

name: Surina Nemmonis
origin: A green Dragonborn from a glassmakers' lane where furnace work taught her songs to hold shape.
appearance: Emerald scales, amber eyes, and translucent glass flowers braided through her horns.
voice: Hissing, musical, and bright with street patter.
mannerism: Breathes tiny glass bubbles when nervous.
attitude: Playful, proud, and quick to protect children in a crowd.
tiny_backstory: Surina left the glassworks after her breath made a rose that whispered her own name.
hook_or_secret: Her glass animals run away at night and return with dust from locked rooms.

name: Nimble Porridgepot
origin: A Halfling from a roadside inn where every soup had a rumor and every spoon had a favorite guest.
appearance: Curly blond hair, patched waistcoat, and a belt of mismatched spoons that never clatter together.
voice: Cozy, quick, and serious only when ladles stop moving.
mannerism: Reads reflections in soup before tasting it.
attitude: Friendly, hungry, and impossible to embarrass.
tiny_backstory: Nimble heard his first prophecy from a soup spoon during a bad winter stew.
hook_or_secret: One spoon refuses to reflect anyone who is lying about their name.

name: Tilly Sparkmote
origin: A Gnome from a festival town where lantern oil is taxed and candle gossip is free.
appearance: Copper curls, tiny burn scars, and a tray of candles that lean toward secrets.
voice: Bright, conspiratorial, and delighted by useful trouble.
mannerism: Lights candles with a snap she insists is not magic.
attitude: Helpful for a price, kinder when no one is watching.
tiny_backstory: Tilly began making left-handed candles after ordinary ones kept revealing boring truths.
hook_or_secret: Her black candle burns only in the presence of a promise about to be broken.

name: Urzan Moonjaw
origin: An Orc from a night bazaar where blades are sharpened under moonlight to keep tempers cool.
appearance: Pale green skin, moon-shaped tusk chip, and a whetstone pouch dusted silver.
voice: Gentle, gravelly, and occasionally half-asleep.
mannerism: Answers some questions before fully waking.
attitude: Courteous, tired, and careful around anger.
tiny_backstory: Urzan discovered he sharpened knives better while sleepwalking than awake.
hook_or_secret: Blades he sharpens hum near the person they most want to protect.

name: Amara Vell
origin: An Aasimar from a hill shrine where unsent apologies are burned at dawn.
appearance: Soft brown skin, pearl-bright eyes, and a satchel full of sealed letters smelling faintly of smoke.
voice: Gentle, grave, and impossible to dismiss.
mannerism: Turns down nearby lamps before delivering bad news.
attitude: Compassionate, firm, and allergic to excuses.
tiny_backstory: Amara began carrying apologies after one letter reached her from a man dead twenty years.
hook_or_secret: Her satchel grows heavier near anyone owed an apology by the dead.

name: Drom Hailreader
origin: A Goliath from avalanche country who claims every mountain keeps a small echo for later.
appearance: Granite-gray skin, frost-white tattoos, and a little wooden box tied shut with blue cord.
voice: Low, thoughtful, and punctuated by weather reports no one requested.
mannerism: Shakes his wooden box gently before making decisions.
attitude: Patient, helpful, and mildly offended by flat land.
tiny_backstory: Drom survived a slide by listening to snow settle inside his own pack.
hook_or_secret: The box contains the sound of an avalanche that has not happened yet.

name: Basil Fen
origin: A Human from a theater district where costumes are mended with gossip, pins, and borrowed light.
appearance: Thin mustache, black measuring tape, and a coat whose shadow never fits his body.
voice: Polished, hushed, and theatrically offended by bad hems.
mannerism: Measures shadows before shoulders.
attitude: Charming, fussy, and more helpful than trustworthy.
tiny_backstory: Basil learned shadow tailoring after repairing curtains in a playhouse that had no backstage wall.
hook_or_secret: He can sew a shadow smaller for one night, making its owner seem less guilty.

name: Nyrielle Frostpetal
origin: An Elf from a snowbound garden where blossoms open only for unsaid words.
appearance: White hair, violet cloak, and frost flowers blooming in a basket lined with black soil.
voice: Clear, cool, and kinder than her stare suggests.
mannerism: Tucks flowers behind ears, then asks what someone avoided saying.
attitude: Direct, mournful, and quietly generous.
tiny_backstory: Nyrielle brought flowers to markets after realizing grief buys more gently than romance.
hook_or_secret: Her blue blossom wilts whenever a true confession is nearby and withheld.

name: Orsik Rumblestep
origin: A Dwarf from an old road crew that believed streets get sore where crowds tell too many lies.
appearance: Broad nose, slate beard, mallet belt, and chalk lines on his palms.
voice: Blunt, cheerful, and full of road complaints.
mannerism: Cracks his knuckles whenever a street groans.
attitude: Helpful, stubborn, and personally offended by potholes.
tiny_backstory: Orsik found he could settle a street's aches after hearing cobbles whisper under tax collectors.
hook_or_secret: A road he treated keeps trying to curve around one ordinary-looking house.

name: Donaar Linxakasendalor
origin: A gold Dragonborn from hot springs where miners, elders, and liars all sweat out secrets.
appearance: Gold scales dulled by steam, towel over one shoulder, and inked maxims on his horn bands.
voice: Rich, slow, and pleased with his own questions.
mannerism: Writes brief philosophies in steam on mirrors.
attitude: Relaxed, wise enough, and impossible to rush.
tiny_backstory: Donaar abandoned debate halls after a bathhouse answer solved a feud they had argued for years.
hook_or_secret: His steam writings remain visible only to people avoiding the truth.

name: Elsie Nettlefoot
role: button witch of the laundry line
origin: A Halfling from a clothworkers' courtyard where buttons are saved from every lost coat.
appearance: Gray curls, red shawl, and hundreds of buttons sewn to her skirt in no clear pattern.
voice: Warm, blunt, and full of household verdicts.
mannerism: Chooses buttons by touch before giving advice.
attitude: Kind, meddlesome, and devastatingly practical.
tiny_backstory: Elsie began button work after one button led a crying child back to the right door.
hook_or_secret: Her brass button always points toward the owner of a garment, living or dead.

name: Quib Pindlesprocket
origin: A Gnome from a canyon bazaar where echoes are bottled, traded, and occasionally returned for store credit.
appearance: Green spectacles, purple coat, and glass vials that murmur when shaken.
voice: Fast, theatrical, and occasionally answered by himself from yesterday.
mannerism: Samples echoes like wine before selling them.
attitude: Entertaining, evasive, and honest about being mostly honest.
tiny_backstory: Quib bought his first echo from a well that complimented his hat.
hook_or_secret: One vial repeats the exact words that will end the next argument nearby.

name: Yagra Softstep
origin: An Orc from river camps where lullabies are traded with blankets and firewood.
appearance: Dark green skin, silver nose ring, and a drum wrapped in patched baby blankets.
voice: Deep, tender, and frighteningly quiet when tracking a tune.
mannerism: Taps heartbeat rhythms on doorframes.
attitude: Protective, patient, and unsentimental about fear.
tiny_backstory: Yagra hunts lost lullabies because one song saved her nephew from a fever dream.
hook_or_secret: She is following a lullaby now being hummed by people who never sleep.

name: Tavian Larklight
origin: An Aasimar from a lamplighter family that swears every flame has a pulse.
appearance: Amber eyes, soot-smudged cheeks, and a doctor's satchel full of wicks and tiny mirrors.
voice: Soft, clinical, and fond of diagnosing moods in lamps.
mannerism: Checks lantern flames with two fingers held near the glass.
attitude: Gentle, focused, and quietly overworked.
tiny_backstory: Tavian began treating streetlamps after one went dark from heartbreak outside a widow's room.
hook_or_secret: A row of lamps keeps developing the same illness near a hidden cellar.

name: Nara Cloudhand
origin: A Goliath from sky meadows where children learn to herd sheep and weather with equal patience.
appearance: Tall, pale gray, with cloudlike white tattoos and a crook carved from storm-felled wood.
voice: Slow, amused, and full of sky measurements.
mannerism: Whistles upward instead of outward.
attitude: Practical, serene, and unimpressed by indoor urgency.
tiny_backstory: Nara started shepherding cloud-shadows after one followed her home and shaded a sick lamb.
hook_or_secret: Her smallest shadow-cloud rains only over graves with unfinished business.

name: Copper Whisker
origin: A Tabaxi from a night market that opens only when enough people misplace important things.
appearance: Copper-striped fur, green eyes, and a velvet coat lined with tiny labeled pockets.
voice: Purring, precise, and delighted by sentimental clutter.
mannerism: Weighs memories on a brass scale before naming prices.
attitude: Polite, greedy, and oddly respectful of regret.
tiny_backstory: Copper Whisker learned pawn work from an aunt who could appraise a promise by scent.
hook_or_secret: He has a pawn ticket for something the party has not lost yet.

name: Mossy Nell
origin: A Firbolg from a damp old manor garden where moss remembers every guest's manners.
appearance: Soft gray skin, moss-green braids, and a lace collar slowly growing harmless lichen.
voice: Gentle, formal, and mortified by rudeness to mushrooms.
mannerism: Curtsies to walls before entering old rooms.
attitude: Kind, peculiar, and strict about apologies.
tiny_backstory: Mossy Nell left the manor after the wallpaper began correcting guests more politely than she could.
hook_or_secret: She can ask mildew who last touched a wall, but it expects compliments first.

name: Borrowed Thunder
origin: A Kenku from a lighthouse rookery where storms are cataloged by pitch and personality.
appearance: Blue-black feathers, oilskin hood, and wax cylinders strapped in a careful chest harness.
voice: Speaks in thunderclaps, lighthouse bells, and sailors' muttered prayers.
mannerism: Tilts his head until distant sounds line up.
attitude: Earnest, exacting, and offended by fake storm stories.
tiny_backstory: Borrowed Thunder survived a shipwreck by mimicking the storm until it answered back.
hook_or_secret: One cylinder contains thunder from a clear day that has not arrived yet.

name: Greta Pins
origin: A Human from a fairground family that faked ghosts until one began correcting their technique.
appearance: Sharp eyes, black scarf, and a box of bells labeled with ordinary names.
voice: Theatrical by habit, sincere by accident.
mannerism: Apologizes to empty chairs before sitting.
attitude: Canny, tired, and surprisingly ethical about fraud.
tiny_backstory: Greta still uses stage tricks because real ghosts are unreliable and terrible at timing.
hook_or_secret: One bell rings only when someone nearby has been forgotten by every living relative.

name: Isera Wick
origin: A Tiefling from a riverboat galley where smoke stains are read before menus are written.
appearance: Lavender skin, short curled horns, and a cook's apron lined with matchbooks from impossible inns.
voice: Husky, amused, and brisk about kitchen safety.
mannerism: Strikes matches on her horn and watches the smoke curl.
attitude: Practical, flirtatious, and hard to truly impress.
tiny_backstory: Isera learned fortunes from match smoke after burning soup so badly it predicted a wedding.
hook_or_secret: Her last matchbook bears the name of a tavern that burned down before it opened.

name: Torinn Yarjerit
origin: A white Dragonborn from windy cliffs where kites are flown to test storms and stubborn teeth.
appearance: Chalk-white scales, blue eyes, and a necklace of tiny carved teeth and kite spars.
voice: Crisp, clinical, and oddly proud of crosswinds.
mannerism: Taps his own fangs when reading cloud shapes.
attitude: Helpful, eccentric, and offended by neglected jaw pain.
tiny_backstory: Torinn discovered storm teeth after pulling a fisherman's molar that whistled before lightning.
hook_or_secret: He can tell where a storm last bit the world by examining cracked teeth.
